english_translation: That which is real is nearer than the neckartery you have shot the arrow of thought far afield

persian_text: ای ز غم مرده که دست از نان تهی است چون غفور است و رحیم این ترس چیست
english_translation: O thou that art dead with anxiety because thy hands are empty of bread what is this fear since He is forgiving and merciful

persian_text: ای بسا مرغی ز معده وز مغص بر کنار بام محبوس قفص
english_translation: Oh many the bird that through its belly and pangs of hunger was made captive in a cage on the edge of a terrace

persian_text: گر ستانی پارهای گریان شود پارهگر بازش دهی خندان شود
english_translation: If you take a piece away he begins to weep and if you give the piece back to him he begins to laugh

persian_text: از پس هر پرده قومی را مقام صف صفاند این پردههاشان تا امام
english_translation: Behind each veil a certain class has its place of abode these veils of theirs are  rank by rank up to the Imám

persian_text: این قدرگر هم نگویم ای سند شیشهی دل از ضعیفی بشکند
english_translation: if I should not utter even this amount O trusted  the phial my heart would burst from weakness

persian_text: آنچ بر فرعون زد آن بحر کین وآنچ با قارون نمودست این زمین
english_translation: How that vengeful Sea dashed on Pharaoh and how this Earth behaved to Qárún

persian_text: از برون زنجیر در را در فکند که ازو بد خشمگین و دردمند
english_translation: She put in the doorchain from the outside for she was angry with him and resentful

persian_text: ز آن نماید مختصر در چشم تو تا زبون بینیش جنبد خشم تو
english_translation: She appears exiguous in your eyes to the end that you may regard her as feeble and that your wrath may be stirred

persian_text: شرم دار و لاف کم زن جان مکن که بسی جاسوس هست آن سوی تن
english_translation: Be ashamed and do not utter idle words do not torment yourself  for there are many spies beyond the body

persian_text: مبتلی چون دید تاویلات رنج برد بیند کی شود او مات رنج
english_translation: When an afflicted person has perceived the interpretations of his pain he sees the victory how should he be vanquished by the pain

persian_text: بهر این مقدار آتش شاندن آب پاک و بول یکسان شدن به فن
english_translation: For the purpose of quenching this amount of fire pure water and urine are alike in skill

persian_text: در هوا میکرد خود بالای برج که هزیمت میشد از وی روم و گرج
english_translation: In the air it was making itself above the zodiac so that Greeks and Georgians would flee from it in panic

persian_text: گفت کودک آن خیال دیووشگر بدو این گفته باشد مادرش
english_translation: said the child suppose the devilish bogles mother has said this to it

persian_text: آنکه بیآن روز تو تاریک شد همچو دوکی گردنت باریک شد
english_translation: That in the absence of that  your day has become dark your neck has become thin as a spindle

persian_text: گر هلالمگر بلالم میدوم مقتدی آفتابت میشوم
english_translation: Whether I am Bilál or the new moon  I am running on and following the course of Thy sun

persian_text: یک دو میدان در پی عیسی براند پس بجد جد عیسی را بخواند
english_translation: He pushed on in pursuit of Jesus for the distance of one or two fields and then invoked Jesus with the utmost earnestness

persian_text: سیلیی در وقت بر مسکین بزن که رهاند آنش از گردن زدن
english_translation: Give the poor fellow a slap in season it will save him from beheading

persian_text: نامهی پر ظلم و فسق و کفر و کین لایقست انصاف ده اندر یمین
english_translation: Deal equitably  is a scroll full of injustice and wickedness and unbelief and enmity fit in the right hand

persian_text: هر یکی از یکدیگر بیمغزتر صادقان را یک ز دیگر نغزتر
english_translation: Every one more pithless than another  in the case of the sincere is more excellent than the other

persian_text: چند لشکر میرود تا بر خورد برگ او فی گردد و بر سر خورد
english_translation: How often does an army march to enjoy the fruits  its equipment becomes spoil  and it is overthrown

persian_text: ز آتش این ظالمانت دل کباب از تو جمله اهد قومی بد خطاب
english_translation: Thy heart is roasted by the fire of these unrighteous men all thy appeal has been Guide my people

persian_text: گفت یزدان آنک باشد اصل دان پس ترا کی بیند او اندر میان
english_translation: God said He who perceives the origin  how then should he be conscious of thy intervention

persian_text: این روشها مختلف بیند برون زان خیالات ملون ز اندرون
english_translation: He sees that these modes of action in the external world are diverse from the various phantasies within

persian_text: آن همه سختی و زورست و عرق وین همه سیمست و زرست و طبق
english_translation: The former is wholly hardship and effort and sweat while the latter is wholly silver and gold and trays

persian_text: چشم او مانده است در جوی روان بیخبر از ذوق آب آسمان
english_translation: His eye remains upon the running stream unaware of the delicious taste of the Water of Heaven

persian_text: شد ز خشم و غم درون بقعهای سوی شه بنوشت خشمین رقعهای
english_translation: by anger and resentment he went into a certain place and wrote an angry letter to the king

persian_text: ساحران مهتاب پیمایند زود پیش بازرگان و زر گیرند سود
english_translation: Magicians quickly measure moonbeams in the presence of the merchant and receive gold as profit

persian_text: زانک بس با عکس من در بافتی قوت تجرید ذاتم یافتی
english_translation: Because thou hast been much occupied with My reflexion thou hast gained the power to contemplate My essence denuded

persian_text: هر کجا خواهد فرستد تعزیت هر کجا خواهد ببخشد تهنیت
english_translation: He sends condolence wheresoever he will he bestows felicitation wheresoever he will

persian_text: این طبیبان را به جان بنده شوید تا به مشک و عنبر آکنده شوید
english_translation: Become devoted to these physicians with soul that ye may be filled with musk and ambergris

persian_text: عاقلان و زیرکانشان ز اتفاق گشته منکر زین چنین باغی و عاق
english_translation: By one consent the intelligent and acute amongst them have become incredulous of such a garden as this and undutiful

persian_text: آتشی کز شعلهاش کمتر شرار میبسوزد جرم و جبر و اختیار
english_translation: Such a fire that the least spark of the flame thereof is consuming sin and necessity and freewill

persian_text: آنچ من دیدم ز هول بیامان طفل دیدی پیر گشتی در زمان
english_translation: If a child had seen the pitiless horror that I saw it would instantly have become old

persian_text: یاد دادش جور اخوان و حسد گفت کان زنجیر بود و ما اسد
english_translation: He spoke to him of the injustice and envy of his brethren Joseph said That was a chain and I was the lion

persian_text: این خیال اینجا نهان پیدا اثر زین خیال آنجا برویاند صور
english_translation: Here this fancy is hidden the traces are visible but there He from this fancy will produce forms

persian_text: حرص صیادی ز صیدی مغفلست دلبریی میکند او بیدلست
english_translation: The greed of hunting makes oblivious of being a prey he tries to win hearts he has lost his own

persian_text: تک مران در کش عنان مستور به هر کس از پندار خود مسرور به
english_translation: Do not gallop draw rein tis better it should be veiled tis better that every one should be gladdened by his own fancy

persian_text: چون شکوفه ریخت میوه شد پدید چون که آن کم شد شد این اندر مزید
english_translation: When the blossom was shed the fruit became visible when that diminished this began to increase

persian_text: ز امر شاه خویش بیرون آمدیم با عنایات پدر یاغی شدیم
english_translation: We have transgressed the command of our King we have rebelled against the favours of our father

persian_text: گفت یک روزی به خواجهی گیلیی نان پرستی نر گدا زنبیلیی
english_translation: One day a sturdy beggar very fond of bread and carried a basket  accosted a Khwája of Gílán

persian_text: و انکه لنگ و لوک آنسو میجهی از همه لنگی و لوکی میرهی
english_translation: And thy hopping lamely and limply in that direction thou wilt be freed from all lameness and limpness

persian_text: علمآموزی طریقش قولی است حرفت آموزی طریقش فعلی است
english_translation: If thou wouldst learn knowledge the way of it is oral if thou wouldst learn a craft the way of it is practical

persian_text: ای عجب در عهد ما ظالم کجاست کو نه اندر حبس و در زنجیر ماست
english_translation: Oh wonderful Where in Our epoch is the oppressor that is not in Our prison and chains

persian_text: بیان اتحاد عاشق و معشوق از روی حقیقت اگر چه متضادند
english_translation: Setting forth the real oneness of the lover and the beloved although they are contrary to each other

persian_text: کالهی معیوب بخریده بدم شکر کز عیبش بگه واقف شدم
english_translation: I had bought defective goods thanks that I have become aware of their defectiveness in time

persian_text: مکر شیطانست تعجیل و شتاب لطف رحمانست صبر و احتساب
english_translation: Precipitation and haste is the Devils wile patience and calculation is Gods grace

persian_text: داستان آن عاشق کی با معشوق خود برمیشمرد خدمتها و وفاهای خود را
english_translation: Story of the lover who was recounting to his beloved his acts of service and loyalty

persian_text: خویش را از رهروان کمتر شمر تو حریف رهریانی گه مخور
english_translation: Do not count thyself one of the travellers on the Way thou art a comrade of them that defile the Way do not eat dung

persian_text: چون کسی بیخواست او بر وی براند خاربن در ملک و خانهی او نشاند
english_translation: When some one has forced his way in against his will and planted a thornbush in his property and house

persian_text: آنچنان ابری نباشد پردهبند پردهدر باشد به معنی سودمند
english_translation: Such a cloud is not veiltying it is in reality veiltearing salutary

persian_text: چون ز بیصبری قرین غیر شد در فراقش پر غم و بیخیر شد
english_translation: since from lack of patience he associated himself with others  in separation from Him he became sorrowful and deprived of good

persian_text: کان اسیران را بجز دوری نبود دیدن فرعون دستوری نبود
english_translation: For to those captives there was naught but farness  the sight of Pharaoh was not permitted

persian_text: شاه با او در سخن اینجا رسید یا بدید از وی نشانی یا ندید
english_translation: The King in conversation with him arrived at this point he either saw or did not see a sign

persian_text: ز آب آتش ز آن گریزان میشود کاتشش از آب ویران میشود
english_translation: Fire becomes fleeing from water for the reason that its fire is ruined by water

persian_text: کی توان او را فشردن یا زدن که چو شیشه گشته است او را بدن
english_translation: How is it possible to torture or beat him since his body has become as a glass

persian_text: بود شبهای مخوف و منتحس پس به جد میجست دزدان را عسس
english_translation: They were nights of alarm and disaster and the police were searching for the thieves with all their might

persian_text: از کجا آموختی اینای بزرگ گفت ای شاه جهان از حال گرگ
english_translation: Whence didst thou learn this O eminent one O King of the world he replied  from the fate of the wolf

persian_text: جان که او دنبالهی زاغان پرد زاغ او را سوی گورستان برد
english_translation: The spirit that flies after crowsthe crow carries it towards the graveyard

persian_text: چونک هفت و هشت از مه بگذرید شاهپیل آمد ز چشمه میچرید
english_translation: When seven and eight of the month had passed the king elephant came to drink from the spring

persian_text: بس به گورستان غریو افتاد و آه تا قیامت زین غلط وا حسرتاه
english_translation: Then in the graveyard arises uproar and lament on account of this mistake alas till the Resurrection

persian_text: بر امیر و مطبخی و نامهبر عیب بنهاده ز جهل آن بیخبر
english_translation: That heedless man ignorantly puts the blame on the Amir and the steward and the lettercarrier

persian_text: انتظار چیستیای کان شر رو چه وا پس میکنی ای خیرهسر
english_translation: What art thou expecting O mine of mischief Why art thou looking back O giddyheaded man

persian_text: اندر انبان میفشارد نیک و بد دانههای در و حبات نخود
english_translation: Cramming into the bag good and bad  single pearls and chickpeas

persian_text: در زمانه هیچ زهر و قند نیست که یکی را پا دگر را بند نیست
english_translation: In Time there is no poison or sugar that is not a foot to one and a fetter to another

persian_text: چرب و شیرین و شرابات ثمین دادش و بس جامهی ابریشمین
english_translation: He gave him oily and sweet and costly sherbets and many silken robes

persian_text: رفت صوفی گفت خلوت با دو یار تو فقیهی وین شریف نامدار
english_translation: the Súfí departed he said in private to the two friends Thou art a jurist and this is a renowned Sharíf

persian_text: پس بدو گفت آن یکیای ذو فنون این دوا خواهند از بهر جنون
english_translation: Then said that person to him O master of sciences this medicine is sought for madness

persian_text: عاشق خود را فتاده خفته دید اندکی از آستین او درید
english_translation: He found his lover lying asleep he tore off a little piece of his sleeve

persian_text: حس را بیخواب خواب اندر کند تا که غیبیها ز جان سر بر زند
english_translation: He  without being asleep  puts his senses to sleep so that the unseen things may emerge from the Soul

persian_text: هرچه آید ز آسمان سوی زمین نه مفر دارد نه چاره نه کمین
english_translation: Whatsoever may come from Heaven to the earth it has no refuge or device or hidingplace

persian_text: او نمیدانست کاندر مرتعه از گلاب آمد ورا آن واقعه
english_translation: he did not know that from rosewater in the meadow that calamity had overtaken him

persian_text: حیرت اندر حیرتست ای یار من این نه کار تست و نه هم کار من
english_translation: Tis bewilderment on bewilderment O my friend this is not your affair nor is it mine either

persian_text: کور بر اشکم رونده همچو مار چشمها بگشاد در باغ و بهار
english_translation: The blind man going on his belly like a snake he has opened his eyes in the garden and in spring

persian_text: شاه امروزینه و فردای ماست پوست بندهی مغز نغزش دایماست
english_translation: He is our king today and tomorrow the husk is for ever a slave to his goodly kernel

persian_text: ذاب جسمی من اشارات الکنی منذ عاینت البقاء فی الفنا
english_translation: My body is wasted away by secret indications of the mysteries ever since I beheld eternal life in dying to self

persian_text: در تضرع جوی و در افنای خویش کز تفکر جز صور ناید به پیش
english_translation: Seek in selfabasement and in selfextinction for nothing but forms is produced by thinking

persian_text: بقیهی ذکر آن مهمان مسجد مهمانکش
english_translation: The remainder of the story of the guest in the guestkilling mosque

persian_text: جوحی هر سالی ز درویشی به فن رو بزن کردی کای دلخواه زن
english_translation: Every year on account of poverty Júhí would artfully turn to his wife and say O sweetheart

persian_text: که ز آواز تو خلقی بیشمار جان بدادند و شدند آن را شکار
english_translation: For from thy voice a countless multitude gave up the ghost and fell a prey to it

persian_text: گفتم ار عریان شود او در عیان نی تو مانی نی کنارت نی میان
english_translation: I said If He should become naked in vision neither wilt thou remain nor thy bosom nor thy waist

persian_text: سوی تو ماهست و سوی خلق ابر تا نبیند رایگان روی تو گبر
english_translation: In relation to thee it is the moon and in relation to the people it is the cloud in order that the infidel may not see thy face for nothing

persian_text: آنک داند نیمشب گوساله را چون نداند همره دهساله را
english_translation: He that knows a colt at midnight how should he not know his own ten years comrade

persian_text: طوطیی در آینه میبیند او عکس خود را پیش او آورده رو
english_translation: A parrot sees its reflexion facing it in the mirror

persian_text: وقت بدرودن گه منجل زدن روز پاداش آمد و پیدا شدن
english_translation: The season of reaping and the time of plying the sickle is the day of recompense and manifestation

persian_text: باد قهرست و بلای شمع کش جز که شمع حق نمیپاید خمش
english_translation: Tis the wind of vengeance and the woe that extinguishes the candle  No candle but Gods is enduring Be silent

persian_text: گر بدی پرده ز غیر لبس او پاره گشتیگر بدی کوه دوتو
english_translation: Had the veil been of anything except his raiment it would have been torn to shreds if it had been a solid mountain

persian_text: یک گزی ره که بدان سو میروی همچو گز قطب مساحت میشوی
english_translation: When thou goest one ells length in that direction like the ell thou wilt become the standard of measurement

persian_text: نیست نور برق بهر رهبری بلک امریست ابر را که میگری
english_translation: The light of the lightning is not for guidance on the way nay it is a command to the cloud to weep

persian_text: گفت قسام آن بود کو خویش را کرد قسمت بر هوا و بر خدا
english_translation: He replied The sharer is he that has shared himself between sensuality and God

persian_text: عقل در شرحش چو خر در گل بخفت شرح عشق و عاشقی هم عشق گفت
english_translation: In expounding it  the intellect lay down like an ass in the mire it was Love that uttered the explanation of love and loverhood

persian_text: حس را حیوان مقرست ای رفیق لیک ادراک دلیل آمد دقیق
english_translation: Animals acknowledge the sense O comrade but it is a subtle matter to apprehend the proof

persian_text: گر ازین سایه روی سوی منی زود طاغی گردی و ره گم کنی
english_translation: If thou go from this shade towards egoism thou wilt soon become disobedient and lose the way

persian_text: مصطفی گفتش که اکنون چاره چیست گفت این بنده مر او را مشتریست
english_translation: Mustafá said to him Now what is the remedy He replied This servant is going to buy him

persian_text: از پگه حمال آورد او چو باد زود آن صندوق بر پشتش نهاد
english_translation: Early he like the wind fetched a porter and immediately put the chest on his back

persian_text: جان چو بی این جیفه بنماید جمال من نتانم گفت لطف آن وصال
english_translation: When the Spirit displays its beauty without this carcase I cannot express the loveliness of that union

persian_text: در دل مومن بگنجم ای عجبگر مرا جویی در آن دلها طلب
english_translation: I am contained in the true believers heart oh how wonderful If thou seekest Me search in those hearts

persian_text: پس بدانی چونک رستی از بدن گوش و بینی چشم میداند شدن
english_translation: Then when thou hast been delivered from the body thou wilt know that ear and nose can become eye

persian_text: آنچنان که وجه وام شیخ بود بسته و موقوف گریهی آن وجود
english_translation: Tis just as the payment of the Shaykhs debts was contingent and dependent on the weeping of that creature

persian_text: که منش دیدم میان مجلسی او ز تقوی عاری است و مفلسی
english_translation: I saw him amidst a company  he is one denuded and destitute of piety

persian_text: وصف هستی میرود از پیکرت وصف مستی میفزاید در سرت
english_translation: The qualities of existence will depart from thy body the qualities of intoxication will increase in thy head

persian_text: اقتدا کردن قوم از پس دقوقی
english_translation: How the company followed the leadership of Daqúqí

persian_text: حقها بر وی تو ثابت کردهای رنجها در کار او بس بردهای
english_translation: You have laid obligations on him you have taken great pains on his account

persian_text: از پس آن محو قبض او نماند پرگشاد و بسط شد مرکب براند
english_translation: After that effacement its constriction ceased it opened its wings and expanded and sped on its way

persian_text: زور را بگذار و زاری را بگیر رحم سوی زاری آید ای فقیر
english_translation: Renounce power and adopt piteous supplication mercy comes towards piteous supplication O dervish

persian_text: جنگ میکردند حمالان پریر تو مکش تا من کشم حملش چو شیر
english_translation: The day before yesterday the porters were quarrelling  Dont you lift  let me lift his load like a lion

persian_text: زین تنازعها محمد در عجب در تعجب نیز مانده بولهب
english_translation: By these contentions Mohammed was astonished Abú Lahab also remained in astonishment

persian_text: این مسلمان از کرم میخواندمگر نگردم زود پیش آید ندم
english_translation: This Moslem is calling me in kindness unless I return quickly repentance will befall

persian_text: وای آنک عقل او ماده بود نفس زشتش نر و آماده بود
english_translation: Alas for him whose reason is female while his wicked fleshly soul is male and ready

persian_text: از فراق تلخ میگویی سخن هر چه خواهی کن و لیکن این مکن
english_translation: Thou art talking of bitter separation  do whatever thou wilt but do not this

persian_text: هر که با اهل کسان شد فسقجو اهل خود را دان که قوادست او
english_translation: Whoever seeks to commit adultery with peoples wives know that he is a pimp to his own wife

persian_text: چشم بینا بهتر از سیصد عصا چشم بشناسد گهر را از حصا
english_translation: A seeing eye is better than three hundred staves the eye knows pearls from pebbles

persian_text: همچو آن روبه کم اشکم کنید پیش او روباه بازی کم کنید
english_translation: Make little of your bellies like that fox do not play foxs tricks in His presence

persian_text: حس خشکی دید کز خشکی بزاد عیسی جان پای بر دریا نهاد
english_translation: The sense saw dryness because it was born of dryness  the Jesus of the spirit set foot on the sea

persian_text: صد هزاران سال ابلیس لعین بود ز ابدال و امیر المؤمنین
english_translation: Hundreds of thousands of years the accursed Iblís was a saint and the prince of true believers

persian_text: کار بیاستاد خواهی ساختن جاهلانه جان بخواهی باختن
english_translation: Thou wilt set to work without the expert and wilt foolishly hazard thy life

persian_text: گفت با این شکل و این گند دهان دور بنشین لیک آنسوتر مران
english_translation: He said With this aspect and this foul smell of the mouth sit at a distance but do not move too far off

persian_text: ساعتی شد مرد جنبیدن گرفت خلق گفتند این فسونی بد شگفت
english_translation: A short while passed the man began to move the people said This was a wonderful charm

persian_text: زین سبب نبود ولی را اعتراض هرچه بستاند فرستد اعتیاض
english_translation: On this account the saint has no objection  whatsoever He takes away He sends compensation

persian_text: ور ز مثقالی شوی افزون تو خام از تو سازد شه یکی زرینه جام
english_translation: And if thou foolish man become greater than a mithqál  the King will make of thee a cup of gold

persian_text: هر که دید این مرهم از زخم ایمن است هر بدی کاین حسن دید او محسن است
english_translation: Every one that has seen this plaster is safe from the wound every evil one that has seen this good is a welldoer

persian_text: چون حریص خوردنی زن خواه زود ورنه آمد گربه و دنبه ربود
english_translation: Since you are fond of eating and drinking ask a woman at once else the cat comes and carries off the fat sheeps tail

persian_text: در هر آنجا که برآرد موش دست نیست گربه یا که نقش گربه است
english_translation: Wherever the mouse gets the upper hand no cat is there or there is the form of a cat

persian_text: جمله محروم و ز خوف از چشمه دور حیلهای کردند چون کم بود زور
english_translation: All were deprived and far from the spring by dread since strength was inferior they made a plot

persian_text: چند درد فرقتش بکشد مرا سر ببر تا عشق سر بخشد مرا
english_translation: How long will the anguish of separation from her be killing me Cut off my head in order that Love may give me a head

persian_text: در تفسیر قول رسول صل الله علیه و اله
english_translation: Commentary on the saying of the Prophet on whom be peace None ever died without wishing if he was a righteous man

persian_text: پس عروسی خواست باید بهر او تا نماید زین تزوج نسل رو
english_translation: It is necessary then to seek a bride for him that from this marriage offspring may appear

persian_text: هم برون افکن هر آنچ افکندنیست در میا با آن کای ن مجلس سنیست
english_translation: Drop outside everything that ought to be dropped do not come in with it for this assemblyplace is of high dignity

persian_text: مانع آید از سخنهای مهم انبیا بردند امر فاستقم
english_translation: It will hinder from important matters The prophets brought the command namely Do thou therefore be righteous

persian_text: همچنانک ذوق آن بانگ الست در دل هر مومنی تا حشر هست
english_translation: Even as the delicious savour of the cryAm not I  Subsists in the heart of every true believer till the Resurrection

persian_text: چون فطامش شد بگفتم با پری تا در آموزید نطق و داوری
english_translation: When he was weaned I told the peris to teach him how to discourse and deal justice

persian_text: فاتحه خواند و بسی لا حول کرد فاتحهش در سینه میافزود درد
english_translation: He recited the Fátiha and uttered many a lá hawl the Fátiha increased the passion in his breast

persian_text: آن زمان کاین جان حیوانی نماند جان باقی بایدت بر جا نشاند
english_translation: At the time when this animal soul is no more it behoves you to set the everlasting spirit in its place

persian_text: زین سبب فرمود حق صلوا علیه که محمد بود محتال الیه
english_translation: For this reason God hath said Do ye bless him  for Mohammed was one to whom were transferred

persian_text: قهر شیرین را به تلخی میبرد تلخ با شیرین کجا اندر خورد
english_translation: Wrath is carrying away the sweet one to bitterness how should the bitter sort with the sweet

persian_text: زر سرخست او سیهتاب آمده از برای رشک این احمقکده
english_translation: He is red gold that has been made black polished iron on account of the enviousness of this abode of fools

persian_text: نالهی سگ در رهش بی جذبه نیست زانک هر راغب اسیر رهزنیست
english_translation: the moan of a dog for His sake is not void of attraction because every one who desires is a brigands captive

persian_text: نطقها نسبت به تو قشرست لیک پیش دیگر فهمها مغزست نیک
english_translation: spoken words are a husk in relation to thee but they are a good kernel for other understandings

persian_text: با تو میگفتم نه با ایشان سخنای سخنبخش نو و آن کهن
english_translation: I was speaking with Thee not with them O Thou that art the Giver of speech newly and of old

persian_text: روز دیگر بر علویان مقل با فقیهان فقیر مشتغل
english_translation: Next day to impoverished descendants of Alí together with poor jurists engaged in study

persian_text: گر بدی صبر و حفاظم راهبر بر فزودی ز اختیارم کر و فر
english_translation: If selfrestraint and safeguarding had been my guide my conquest would have been increased by freewill

persian_text: زین رسالت سنگها چون ناله داشت تا چه خواهد بر گنه کاران گماشت
english_translation: Since the stones bewailed this mission think what it will set over sinners

persian_text: آن غریب شهر سربالا طلب گفت میخسپم درین مسجد بشب
english_translation: That highaspiring stranger to the town said I will sleep in this mosque at night

persian_text: اینچنین که چار پره میپری باز کن آن هدیه را که میبری
english_translation: Even as you are flying with four wings  undo the gift which you are taking away

persian_text: قلب اگر در خویش آخربین بدی آن سیه که آخر شد او اول شدی
english_translation: If the adulterated coin had seen the end in regard to itself it would have become at first the black which it became in the end

persian_text: همچو نی زهری و تریاقی که دید همچو نی دمساز و مشتاقی که دید
english_translation: Who ever saw a poison and antidote like the reed Who ever saw a sympathiser and a longing lover like the reed

persian_text: سوی فارس رو مرو سوی غبار ورنه بر تو کوبد آن مکر سوار
english_translation: Go towards the Horseman go not towards the dust else the cunning of the Rider will beat upon thee

persian_text: ترک خدمت خدمت تو داشتم تا به غربت تخم حیلت کاشتم
english_translation: I hold neglect of service to be your service since I have sown the seed of contrivance by dwelling in a foreign land

persian_text: دور از عاشق که این فکر آیدش ور بیاید خاک بر سر بایدش
english_translation: Far be it from a lover that such a thought should occur to him and if it do dust ought to be on his head

persian_text: اطلس عمرت به مقراض شهور برد پارهپاره خیاط غرور
english_translation: The Tailor Worldly Vanity takes away the satin of your life bit by bit with his scissors the months

persian_text: پاک آنک خاک را رنگی دهد همچو کودکمان بر آن جنگی دهد
english_translation: holy is He who giveth earth a colour and causes us to quarrel over it like children

persian_text: گفت مهمان در چه سوداهاستی پایمردا مست و خوش بر خاستی
english_translation: The guest said In what mad fits are you  O bailiff you have risen intoxicated and merry

persian_text: شد سر شیران عالم جمله پست چون سگ اصحاب را دادند دست
english_translation: The heads of all the lions in the world were laid low when They gave a hand to the dog of the Companions

persian_text: جواب گفتن عاشق عاذلان را
english_translation: The lovers reply to those who chid him

persian_text: میل روحت چون سوی بالا بود در تزاید مرجعت آن جا بود
english_translation: When the propensity of your spirit is upwards in increase and that place is the place to which you will return

persian_text: ز آن همه میلش سوی خاک است کاو در سفر سودی نبیند پیش رو
english_translation: Tis from all that propensity of his towards earth that he sees before him no profit in the journey

persian_text: کان جمال دل جمال باقی است دولتش از آب حیوان ساقی است
english_translation: For that beauty of the heart is the lasting beauty its fortune gives to drink of the Water of Life

persian_text: نور پاکش بیدلیل و بیبیان پوست بشکافد در آید در میان
english_translation: Without proof and without exposition the pure Light cleaves its skin and enters into the middle

persian_text: ز اندرون او برآمد صد خروش زین چنین رسوایی بی خاکپوش
english_translation: E corde ejus ascendunt centum gemitus propter tale opprobrium pulvere non coopertum A hundred groans arose from his inward because of such a disgrace not covered by dust

persian_text: خیره گشتم خیرگی هم خیره گشت موج حیرت عقل را از سر گذشت
english_translation: I became amazed even amazement became amazed the waves of bewilderment passed over the head of my understanding

persian_text: لیک دعوت واردست از کردگار با قبول و ناقبول او را چه کار
english_translation: But to call comes down from the Maker what has he to do with acceptance or nonacceptance

persian_text: در شکار بیشهی جان باز باش همچو خورشید جهان جانباز باش
english_translation: In chase of the spiritual forest be a falcon be one who gambles his soul away like the sun of this world

persian_text: یا نمیدانی که نور آفتاب عکس خورشید برونست از حجاب
english_translation: Or dost not thou know that the light of the sun is the re flexion of the Sun beyond the veil

persian_text: پس ادب کردش بدین جرم اوستاد که مساز از چوب پوسیده عماد
english_translation: Therefore the Master punished him for this sin saying Do not make thy prop of rotten wood

persian_text: گر همان عیبت نبود ایمن مباش بو که آن عیب از تو گردد نیز فاش
english_translation: if you have not the same fault be not secure maybe that fault will afterwards become notorious in you

persian_text: مسلکی دارند دزدیده درون ما ز دزدیهای ایشان سرنگون
english_translation: have a passage stealthily within we are overthrown by their thievish practices

persian_text: بر رخ نقره و یا روی زری وا نما بر سکه نام منکری
english_translation: Show the name of a single unbeliever on the design on the face of any piece of silver or gold

persian_text: حلم او خود را اگر چه گول ساخت خویشتن را اندکی باید شناخت
english_translation: Though his forbearance has feigned to be stupid one must know ones self a little

persian_text: حال این اسپان چنین خوش با نوا من چه مخصوصم به تعذیب و بلا
english_translation: These horses are so happy and prosperous why am I singled out for torment and tribulation

persian_text: مریما بنگر که نقش مشکلم هم هلالم هم خیال اندر دلم
english_translation: O Mary look  for I am a difficult form  I am both a new moon and a phantasy in the heart

persian_text: زانک وجد حلق باقی خورد اوست این نگهدار ار دل تو صیدجوست
english_translation: Since the ecstasies of the people are his leavings Keep this  if your heart desires the prey

persian_text: چون بکوشم تا سرش پنهان کنم سر بر آرد چون علم کاینک منم
english_translation: When I endeavour to hide His secret He lifts up His head like a banner saying Look here am I

persian_text: چشم نرگس کور شد بازش بساخت حلق نی ببرید و بازش خود نواخت
english_translation: The eye of the narcissus became blind He restored it the throat of the reed was cut He himself fostered it again

persian_text: آدمی در حبس دنیا ز آن بود تا بود کافلاس او ثابت شود
english_translation: Man is in the prison of this world in order that peradventure his insolvency may be proven

persian_text: مغز مردی این شناس و پوست آن آن برد دوزخ برد این در جنان
english_translation: Recognise this to be the kernel of manliness and that to be the husk the latter leads to Hell the former to Paradise

persian_text: در ره تاریک مردی جامه کن منتظر استاده بود از بهر فن
english_translation: A clothesrobber stood waiting on the dark road to practise his craft

persian_text: اتصالاتی میان شمعها که نیاید بر زبان و گفت ما
english_translation: such connexions between the candles as may not come on my tongue and my speech

persian_text: معنیاش پنهان و او در پیش خلق خلق کی بینند غیر ریش و دلق
english_translation: His reality was hidden though he was in peoples presence how should the people see aught but beard and frock

persian_text: سنی از تسبیح جبری بیخبر جبری از تسبیح سنی بیاثر
english_translation: The Sunní has a particular glorification the Jabrí has the opposite thereof in refuge

persian_text: عالمی را یک سخن ویران کند روبهان مرده را شیران کند
english_translation: A single word lays waste a world turns dead foxes into lions

persian_text: پرس پرسان میکشیدش تا به صدر گفت گنجی یافتم آخر به صبر
english_translation: with many a question he led him to the dais At last said he I have found a treasure by being patient

persian_text: طبع خواهد تا کشد از خصم کین عقل بر نفس است بند آهنین
english_translation: The nature desires to take revenge on its adversary the reason is an iron chain upon the flesh

persian_text: اولیا را خواب ملکست ای فلان همچو آن اصحاب کهف اندر جهان
english_translation: To the saints O reader sleep is a kingdom as the Men of the Cave in this world

persian_text: شورهام را سبزهای پیدا شود خارزارم جنت ماوی شود
english_translation: Some verdure may appear on my barren soil my thornbrake may become the Garden of abode

persian_text: مرغ آبی غرق دریای عسل عین ایوبی شراب و مغتسل
english_translation: The waterbird was plunged in a sea of honey the fountain of Job to drink and wash in

persian_text: عکس نورانی همه روشن بود عکس ظلمانی همه گلخن بود
english_translation: The reflexion of the man of light is wholly resplendent the reflexion of the man of darkness is wholly a bathstove

persian_text: فتنه و آشوب و خونریزی مجوی بیش از این از شمس تبریزی مگوی
english_translation: Do not seek trouble and turmoil and bloodshed say no more concerning the Sun of Tabriz

persian_text: گفت پیغامبر برای امتحان او نمیبیند ترا کم شو نهان
english_translation: The Prophet said by way of trial He cannot see thee do not hide

persian_text: گفت حق در آفتاب منتجم ذکر تزاور کذا عن کهفهم
english_translation: God hath made mention of the rising sun as turning aside like thatfrom their cave

persian_text: باقی قصهی فقیر روزیطلب بیواسطهی کسب
english_translation: The remainder of the Story of the fakir who desired his daily bread without work as a means

persian_text: چونک میکائیل شد تا خاکدان دست کرد او تا که برباید از آن
english_translation: When Michael reached the Earth he put forth his hand to seize from her

persian_text: افتد اندر دام مکرش ناکسی این گمان سر بر زند از هر خسی
english_translation: A worthless one falls into the snare of its deceit from every base fellow the thought pops up

persian_text: عقل باشد آمنی و عدلجو بر زن و بر مرد اما عقل کو
english_translation: intelligence consists in being safe and in the desire to act justly towards woman and towards man but where is intelligence

persian_text: هر زمان دل را دگر رایی بود آن نه از وی لیک از جایی بود
english_translation: At every time the heart has a different resolution that is not from it but from a certain place

persian_text: باری افزون کش تو این بو را به هوش تا سوی اصلت برد بگرفته گوش
english_translation: At least draw this scent in greater quantity with your intelligence that taking you by the ear it may lead you towards your origin

persian_text: چون ز بند دام باد او شکست نفس لوامه برو یابید دست
english_translation: When his wind is broken by imprisonment in the trapthe rebuking soul gets the upper hand over him

persian_text: این بهانه هم ز دستان دلیست که ازو پاهای دل اندر گلیست
english_translation: this pretext too is one of the lures of the heart whereby the feet of the heart are in a mire

persian_text: قوت جان است اینای راست خوان تا چه باشد قوت آن جان جان
english_translation: O thou who readest aright such is the power of the soul what then must be the power of that Soul of soul

persian_text: زانک گلگر برگ برگش میکنی خنده نگذارد نگردد منثنی
english_translation: Because the rose though thou tear it petal by petal does not leave off laughing and does not become bent

persian_text: داد حق با تو در آمیزد چو جان آنچنان که آن تو باشی و تو آن
english_translation: The gifts of God are mingled with you like the spirit in such wise that you are they and they are you

persian_text: با چنین گبزی و هفت اندام زفت از شکاف در برون جستند و رفت
english_translation: Notwithstanding such bigness and seven stout limbs they sprang forth through a chink in the door and departed

persian_text: پس سالش کرد شخصی بوالفضول که آن دو ننشستند بر جای رسول
english_translation: Then a person given to idle meddling questioned him saying Those two did not sit in the Prophets place

persian_text: دین نه آن باز است کاو از شه گریخت سوی آن کمپیر کاو میآرد بیخت
english_translation: Religion is not the falcon that fled from the King to the old crone who was sifting flour

persian_text: ریش و مو بر کنده رو بدریدگان خاک بر سر کرده خونپر دیدگان
english_translation: They had plucked out their beards and hair their faces were torn they had cast earth on their heads and their eyes were filled with blood

persian_text: چون که در ریش عوام آتش فتاد بند کردندش به زندانی نهاد
english_translation: When fire fell on the beards of the vulgar they bound him and put him in a prison

persian_text: ور تو خوش باشی به کام دوستان این جهان بنمایدت چون گلستان
english_translation: And if thou art happy as thy friends would desire this world seems to thee like a garden of roses

persian_text: گفت نتوانی و طاقت نبودت حس ضعیفست و تنک سخت آیدت
english_translation: He replied Thou canst not and hast not the power to endure it the sense is weak and frail twould be grievous for thee

persian_text: گرچه هر قرنی سخنآری بود لیک گفت سالفان یاری بود
english_translation: Although every generation there is one who brings the word  yet the sayings of them that have gone before are helpful

persian_text: مرد کارنده که انبارش تهیست شاد و خوش نه بر امید نیستیست
english_translation: The sower whose barn is empty is not he joyful and happy in hope of nonexistence

persian_text: شکر میکن مر خدا را در نعم نیز میکن شکر و ذکر خواجه هم
english_translation: Always give thanks to God for His bounties and always give thanks and praise to the Khwája too

persian_text: بعد آن محنت کرا بار دگر پا رود سوی خطر الا که خر
english_translation: After such a tribulation whose foot should move towards danger a second time unless it be an ass

persian_text: من نمیکردم غزا از بهر آن تا ظفر یابم فرو گیرم جهان
english_translation: I did not make war for the sake of gaining victory and conquering the world

persian_text: ما ز موسی پند نگرفتیم کاو گشت از انکار خضری زرد رو
english_translation: We have not taken warning from Moses who was made shamefaced by disbelief in a Khizr

persian_text: تا من و تو هر دو در آتش رویم حجت باقی حیرانان شویم
english_translation: Let me and thee both of us go into the fire and become a lasting proof for the perplexed

persian_text: دیده بینا از لقای حق شود حق کجا هم راز هر احمق شود
english_translation: The eye is made seeing by meeting with God how should God become the confidant of every fool

persian_text: گر نبینی این جهان معدوم نیست عیب جز ز انگشت نفس شوم نیست
english_translation: If thou dost not see this world it is not nonexistent the fault lies not save in the finger of thy evil self

persian_text: گفت من نشناسم او را کیست او گفت او آن ماهروی قندخو
english_translation: He said I do not know him who is he He said He is that moonfaced sweetnatured one

persian_text: گفت شیر ار روشنی افزون شدی زهرهاش بدریدی و دل خون شدی
english_translation: The lion said If the light were to become greater his gallbladder would burst and his heart would turn to blood

persian_text: جز ز اهل شکر و اصحاب وفا که مریشان راست دولت در قفا
english_translation: Excepting the thankful and faithful who are attended by fortune

persian_text: چه تصرف کرد خواهد نقشها بر چنان نقاش بهر ابتلا
english_translation: What authority should the pictures desire to exercise over such an Artist for the purpose of testing Him

persian_text: گرگ ظاهر گرد یوسف خود نگشت این حسد در فعل از گرگان گذشت
english_translation: The outward wolf indeed did not prowl about Joseph this envy has actually surpassed wolves

persian_text: گفت با خود من شهان را دیدهام پیش سلطانان مه و بگزیدهام
english_translation: He said to himself I have seen kings I have been great and chosen in the presence of sultans

persian_text: گفت آری پهلوی یاران خوش است لیکای جان در اگر نتوان نشست
english_translation: Yes said he it is nice beside friends but my dear soul one cannot lodge in if

persian_text: دور دور عیسی استای مردمان بشنوید اسرار کیش او به جان
english_translation: The epoch is the epoch of Jesus O men hearken with your souls unto the mysteries of his religion

persian_text: همچو دیوار شکسته در فتاد هوش و عقلش رفت شد او چون جماد
english_translation: He fell like a broken wall his consciousness and understanding departed he became like lifeless matter

persian_text: چون کراهت رفت آن خود مرگ نیست صورت مرگست و نقلان کردنیست
english_translation: When dislike is gone verily tis not death tis the semblance of death and tis a migration

persian_text: صبر میبیند ز پردهی اجتهاد روی چون گلنار و زلفین مراد
english_translation: Through the curtain of the struggle renunciation sees the face like a pomegranateflower and the two tresses of the Desired One

persian_text: حلقهی آن در هر آنکو میزند بهر او دولت سری بیرون کند
english_translation: When any one continues to knock that doorring felicity peeps out for his sake

persian_text: این به من بگذار که استادم درینگر تقاضاگر بود هر آتشین
english_translation: Leave this to me for I am expert in this even if the claimant be fiery

persian_text: پس در آن رنجوری روز اجل نیست نادرگر بود اینت عمل
english_translation: Therefore it is no wonder if you act in this way in the sickness of your day of doom

persian_text: مردهی خود را رها کرده ست او مردهی بیگانه را جوید رفو
english_translation: He has left his own dead and seeks to mend the dead of a stranger

persian_text: هین روان گردید بیرنج و عنا سوی غفاری و اکرام خدا
english_translation: Hark set off and go without pain or trouble towards the forgiveness and kindness of God

persian_text: شد سیهروز سوم روی همه حکم صالح راست شد بیملحمه
english_translation: On the third day all their faces became black the prediction of Sálih came true without dispute

persian_text: امتحان کردن شیر گرگ را و گفتن که پیش آیای گرگ بخش کن صیدها را میان ما
english_translation: How the lion made trial of the wolf and said Come forward O wolf and divide the prey amongst us

persian_text: تا نمیرم من تو این پیدا مکن دعوی شاهی و استیلا مکن
english_translation: Until I am dead do not reveal this do not lay claim to sovereignty and dominion

persian_text: اعتماد زن بر آن کو هیچ بار این زمان فا خانه نامد او ز کار
english_translation: The wifes confidence was on the fact that he had never come home from his work at this time

persian_text: گربه میبیند بگرد خود قطار مرغش آیس گشته بودست از مطار
english_translation: He sees around him cats in troops his bird has despaired of flying

persian_text: چشم ننهادهست حق در کور موش ز انکه حاجت نیست چشمش بهر نوش
english_translation: God has not put eyes in the mole because it does not need eyes for food

persian_text: گاو موسی دان مرا جان دادهای جزو جزوم حشر هر آزادهای
english_translation: Deem me to be the cow of Moses that gave life  each limb of me is the raising from the dead every one that is free

persian_text: تا بگویندت به لب نی بل به حال که ز دریا کن نه از ما این سال
english_translation: In order that they may say to you not with their lips but implicitly Ask this question of the Sea not of us

persian_text: میشود مبدل به خورشید تموز آن مزاح بارد برد العجوز
english_translation: The chilly temperature of the old womans cold spell is changed by the sun of Tamúz

persian_text: شحم تو در شمعها نفزود تاب لحم تو مخمور را نامد کباب
english_translation: Your fat never increased the light in candles your flesh never became roastmeat for any one drunken with wine

persian_text: باز جانم باز صد صورت تند زخم بر ناقه نه بر صالح زند
english_translation: The falcon my spirit will still weave a hundred forms the blow falls on the shecamel not on Sálih

persian_text: چونک چشمم سرخ باشد در غمش دانمش زان دردگر کم بینمش
english_translation: When my eye is red in ophthalmia I know it is from the disease if I do not see it

persian_text: گفت میخواهم در این کوچه زنی کیست لایق از برای چون منی
english_translation: He said I wish to marry a woman in this street who is suitable for one like me

persian_text: آن حوالی نیستان و بیشه بود شیر بود آنجا که صیدش پیشه بود
english_translation: In the neighbourhood was a reedbed and a jungle where a lion lived whose occupation was hunting

persian_text: چون خدا فرمود ره را راه من این خفیر از چیست و آن یک راهزن
english_translation: Since God has called the Way My Way wherefore is this one a trusty escort and that one a brigand

persian_text: هر کجا سایهست و شب یا سایگه از زمین باشد نه از افلاک و مه
english_translation: Wherever shade and night or shadowy place exist tis by the earth not by the heavens and the moon

persian_text: طبع طاوسست و وسواست کند دم زند تا از مقامت بر کند
english_translation: The carnal nature is a peacock it tempts thee and talks idly that it may remove thee from thy post

persian_text: شیخ وامی سالها این کار کرد میستد میداد همچون پای مرد
english_translation: The debtor Shaykh acted in this fashion for years taking and giving like a steward

persian_text: چون تنازع در فتد در تنگ کاه دانه آن کیست آن را کن نگاه
english_translation: When there happens to be a quarrel about a load of straw observe who is the owner of the grain

persian_text: بس منافق کاندرین ظاهر گریخت خون صد مومن به پنهانی بریخت
english_translation: There is many a hypocrite who has taken refuge in this out ward form and has shed the blood of a hundred true believers in secret

persian_text: جامهاش سوزد بگوید نار نیست جامهاش دوزد بگوید تار نیست
english_translation: It burns his raiment he says There is no fire it stitches his raiment he says There is no thread

persian_text: هر که گل خوارست دردی را گرفت رفت صوفی سوی صافی ناشکفت
english_translation: Whosoever is a clayeater took the dregs the Súfí went impatiently towards the pure

persian_text: متهم کردن غلامان و خواجهتاشان مر لقمان را که آن میوههای ترونده که میآوردیم او خورده است
english_translation: How suspicion was thrown upon Luqmán by the slaves and fellowservants who said that he had eaten the fresh fruit which they were bringing

persian_text: چون بصد الحاح آمد سوی در گفت آخر چیستای جان پدر
english_translation: When  in response to a hundred urgent entreaties he came to the door he said Why what is it my dear sir

persian_text: ای ز تو خوش هم ذکور و هم اناث داد کن المستغاث المستغاث
english_translation: O thou by whom both males and females are happy do justice Thy help is invoked and besought

persian_text: وهم افتد در خطا و در غلط عقل باشد در اصابتها فقط
english_translation: The imagination falls into error and mistake the intellect is only in acts of true perception

persian_text: فکر کو آنجا همه نورست پاک بهر تست این لفظ فکرای فکرناک
english_translation: Where is thought  There all is pure light this word thought is for thy sake O thinker

persian_text: نه زمین را زان فروغ و لمتری نه خداوند زمین را توانگری
english_translation: From that neither do glory and grandeur accrue to the earth nor riches to the owner of the earth

persian_text: بی ز استعداد در کانی روی بر یکی حبه نگردی محتوی
english_translation: you go into a mine without capability you will not gain possession of a single grain

persian_text: گفت او راای عدو جان خویش در عریشم آمده سر کرده پیش
english_translation: He said to him O enemy of thine own life who hast come putting thy head into my hut

persian_text: یک درمتان میشود چار المراد چار دشمن میشود یک ز اتحاد
english_translation: Your one dirhem will become fourthe result desired four enemies will become one through unanimity

persian_text: نوحهی إنا ظلمنا میزدی نیست دستان و فسونش را حدی
english_translation: Crying in lamentation Verily we have wronged  There is no bound to his guile and imposture

persian_text: نسبتیگر هست مخفی از خرد هست بیچون و خرد کی پی برد
english_translation: If there is a relation hidden from the understanding it is ineffable and how should the understanding follow its track

persian_text: قصد آن مه کرد اندر خیمه او عقل کو و از خلیفه خوف کو
english_translation: He sought to embrace that moon in her tent where was his reason and his dread of the Caliph

persian_text: زان زمرد مار را دیده جهد کور گردد مار و رهرو وا رهد
english_translation: At that emerald the snakes eye jumps  the snake is blinded and the traveller is delivered

persian_text: بعد توبه گفتش ای آدم نه من آفریدم در تو آن جرم و محن
english_translation: After his repentance He said to him O Adam did not I create in thee that sin and tribulations

persian_text: آنچ در ره دید از رنج و ستم گرچه در خوردست کوته میکنم
english_translation: Although the afflictions and injuries which he suffered on the road are deserving  I will abridge

persian_text: گفت حقست این ولیای سیبویه اتق من شر من احسنت الیه
english_translation: He said This is true but O Síbawayh be on thy guard against the malice of him to whom thou hast shown kindness

persian_text: کرد آگه آن رسول از وحی دوست که هلاکم عاقبت بر دست اوست
english_translation: The Prophet by inspiration informed my friend that in the end my destruction would be by his hand

persian_text: مانده در کاروانسرا خرد و شگرف روزها با هم ز سرما و ز برف
english_translation: Small and great remain together for days in the caravanseray because of frost and snow

persian_text: آدمی را با همه وحی و نظر اندر افکند آن لعین در شور و شر
english_translation: That accursed one caused an Adam notwithstanding all his inspiration and insight to fall into woe and bane

persian_text: ای شده اندر سفر با صد رضا خود به پای خویش تا سوء القضا
english_translation: O  who with a hundred consents thyself with thine own foot didst enter on the journey to the fated ill

persian_text: در محاق ار ماه نو گردد دو تا نی در آخر بدر گردد بر سما
english_translation: If in that period the new moon is bent double does not she at last become the full moon in the sky

persian_text: صورت نقض وفای ما مباش بیوفایی را مکن بیهوده فاش
english_translation: Do not be the type of our breaking faith do not recklessly make disloyalty notorious

persian_text: گر ستودی اعتناق او بدی ور نکوهیدی فراق او بدی
english_translation: If she praised twas his caresses  and if she blamed twas separation from him

persian_text: اندر آ و آب بین آتش مثال از جهانی کاتش است آبش مثال
english_translation: Come in and see water that has the semblance of fire from a world which is fire and has the semblance of water

persian_text: چون حدیث امتحان رویی نمود یادم آمد قصهی هاروت زود
english_translation: When the subject of probation cropped up the story of Hárút at once came into my memory

persian_text: حلوا خریدن شیخ احمد خضرویه قدس الله سره العزیز جهت غریمان به الهام حق
english_translation: How by Divine inspiration Shaykh Ahmad son of Khizrúya bought halwá for his creditors

persian_text: گر بدزدی وز گل من میبری رو که هم از پهلوی خود میخوری
english_translation: If you will be a thief and take some of my clay go on  for you are eating out of your own side

persian_text: که از آنها گوشت میآید به کار وز ظریفان بانگ و نالهی زیر و زار
english_translation: For in the former the flesh is serviceable but in the clever ones song and warble soft and low

persian_text: فقر و رنجوری به استت ای سند کان تبسم دام خود را بر کند
english_translation: Poverty and distress are better for thee O lord for that smile will remove its lure

persian_text: ما همه مرغابیانیم ای غلام بحر میداند زبان ما تمام
english_translation: We all are waterbirds O lad the Sea fully knows our language

persian_text: چاره کرباس چه بود جان من جز زبون رای آن غالب شدن
english_translation: What resource has the linen my dear friend but to submit to the purpose of the one who is predominant

persian_text: میجهد خون از دهانم با سخنای خدا آخر مکافاتش تو کن
english_translation: Blood gushes from my mouth together with words O God I beseech Thee give him the retribution

persian_text: چون بماند دیر آن باد وزان جمله را بینی به حق لابهکنان
english_translation: When the blowing wind is long delayed you may see them all making humble entreaty to God

persian_text: زین سبب میگویم این بندهی فقیر سلسله از گردن سگ برمگیر
english_translation: For this reason O poor slave  I am always saying Do not remove the collar from the neck of the cur

persian_text: روی موسی بارقی انگیخته پیش رو او توبره آویخته
english_translation: The face of Moses shot forth a flashing beam he hung a veil in front of his face

persian_text: آگاه شدن پیغامبر علیهالسلام از طعن ایشان بر شماتت او
english_translation: How the Prophet on whom be peace became aware of their chiding him for his exultation

persian_text: آن کنیزک میشد و میگفت آه کردیای خاتون تو استا را به راه
english_translation: The maid whilst she went  was saying  Ah mistress thou hast sent away the expert

persian_text: آن کنیزک جست آشفته ز ساز مرد بر جست و در آمد در نماز
english_translation: The maid jumped up in consternation and disorder the man jumped up and began to say his prayers

persian_text: زین سبب عیسی بدان همراه خود در نیاموزید آن اسم صمد
english_translation: On this account Jesus did not teach his fellowtraveller that Name of the Lord

persian_text: پس حق حق سابق از مادر بود هر که آن حق را نداند خر بود
english_translation: Therefore Gods right is prior to the mother whoever does not recognise that right is an ass

persian_text: میرسیدش از سوی هر مهتری بهر دختر دم به دم خوزهگری
english_translation: And there was continually coming to him from every nobleman a wooer to ask for the girl

persian_text: بیشریکی جمله مخلوق خداست آن موالید ار چه نسبتشان به ماست
english_translation: Those results are all created by God without any partner though they are imputed to us

persian_text: گفت حق استت بزن دستت رسید این سزای آنکه از یاران برید
english_translation: You are right he replied beat  you have got the upper hand This is the fit penalty for him that parts from friends

persian_text: گر چه رخنه نیست عالم را پدید خیره یوسفوار میباید دوید
english_translation: Though the world hath no visible crevice  one must run recklessly like Joseph

persian_text: نالیدن ستون حنانه چون برای پیغامبر علیهالسلام منبر ساختند
english_translation: How the moaning pillar complained when they made a pulpit for the Prophet on whom be peace for the multitude had become great

persian_text: هین گلوی خود مبر هانای مهان اینچنین لقمه رسیده تا دهان
english_translation: Hark do not cut your own throat Take heed O despicable one such a morsel as this has reached your mouth

persian_text: بهر گستاخی شوخ غرهای حلمها در پیش حلمت ذرهای
english_translation: For the sake of the boldness of one impudent and deluded O thou beside whose clemency clemencies are a mote

persian_text: گفت چون فرمود آن شاه مطاع من کی بودم تا کنم زان امتناع
english_translation: He replied When that sovereign who is obeyed gave the order who was I that I should resist it

persian_text: در معنی این حدیث که اغتنموا برد الربیع الی آخره
english_translation: On the meaning of the Tradition Take advantage of the coolness of the spring season etc

persian_text: چون به آخر فرد خواهم ماندن خو نباید کرد با هر مرد و زن
english_translation: Since I shall be left alone at the last it behoves me not to become friendly with every man and woman

persian_text: خاک را رنگ و فن و سنگی دهد طفلخویان را بر آن جنگی دهد
english_translation: He gives to earth a certain colour and variety and value and causes childish folk to wrangle over it

persian_text: معجزهی پیغامبری بود آن سقا گشته ابر از محو همرنگ سما
english_translation: That waterskin was a miracle of the Prophet from selfeffacement the cloud had become of the same colour as the sky

persian_text: این بیابان در بیابانهای او همچو اندر بحر پر یک تای مو
english_translation: In the deserts thereof this desert is like a single hair in a full sea

persian_text: منقبض گردند بعضی زین قصص زانک هر مرغی جدا دارد قفص
english_translation: Some are chagrined by this story for every bird hath a separate cage

persian_text: نه به هندست آمن و نه در ختن آنک خصم اوست سایهی خویشتن
english_translation: He whose adversary is his own shadow is not safe either in India or Khutan

persian_text: مردم ده شهر مجموع اندرو لیک جمله سه تن ناشستهرو
english_translation: The people of ten cities were assembled within it but the whole three fellows with unwashed faces

persian_text: چون انا الحق گفت شیخ و پیش برد پس گلوی جمله کوران را فشرد
english_translation: When the Shaykh said I am God and carried it through  he throttled all the blind

persian_text: این زمانت خدمتی هم میکنیم سوی مخدومی صلایت میزنیم
english_translation: at this time also we are serving thee and inviting thee towards sovereignty

persian_text: بگذر از مستی و مستیبخش باش زین تلون نقل کن در استواش
english_translation: Pass beyond intoxication and be one who bestows intoxication  move away from this mutability into His permanence

persian_text: گفت حق تمییز را پیدا کنم عقل بیتمییز را بینا کنم
english_translation: God said I will produce discernment I will make the undiscerning mind able to perceive

persian_text: فاش میگفتی زبان از ریتش جمله را خاصیت و ماهیتش
english_translation: Through his vision his tongue was divulging the properties and quiddities of all things

persian_text: لیک آن مستی شود توبهشکن منسی است این مستی تن جامه کن
english_translation: But that intoxication becomes a breaker of penitence this intoxication of the body causes oblivion and tears the robe

persian_text: آنچ نی را کرد شیرین جان و دل و آنچ خاکی یافت ازو نقش چگل
english_translation: That which made sweet the soul and heart of the sugarcane and that from which the creature of earth gained the form of Chigil

persian_text: آنک او را چشم دل شد دیدبان دید خواهد چشم او عین العیان
english_translation: He whose scout is his inward eyehis eye will behold with the very acme of clairvoyance

persian_text: لیک تا آب از قذی خالی شدن تنقیه شرطست در جوی بدن
english_translation: But it is necessary to cleanse the canal the body until the water is cleared of scum

persian_text: من ز شیطان این نجویم کاوست غیر که مرا بیدار گرداند به خیر
english_translation: From Satan who is other  I do not look for this that he should awaken me with good

persian_text: ور در آن حوض آب شور است و پلید هر یکی لوله همان آرد پدید
english_translation: But if the water in the reservoir is brackish and dirty every pipe brings the same to view

persian_text: داروی مردی بخور اندر عمل تا شوی خورشید گرم اندر حمل
english_translation: Restore your manliness in works that you may become the hot sun in Aries

persian_text: اول آن کس کاین قیاسکها نمود پیش انوار خدا ابلیس بود
english_translation: The first person who produced these paltry analogies in the presence of the Lights of God was Iblís

persian_text: هیچکس را زهره نه تا دم زند یا شفیعی بر شفاعت بر تند
english_translation: No one had the courage to utter a word nor any intercessor to venture on intercession

persian_text: زن بیامد بر گمان آنک شو سوی در خفتست و آنسو آن عمو
english_translation: the wife came  she thought her husband was sleeping towards the door and the uncle on the other side

persian_text: من ز فخر انبیا سر چون کشم خوردهام حلوا و این دم سرخوشم
english_translation: How  should I rebel against the Glory of the prophets I have eaten the halwá and now I am happy

persian_text: این تتماجست آب روی عام که سگ شیطان از آن یابد طعام
english_translation: the honour of the populace is the tutmáj broth by which the Devildog is fed

persian_text: جبرئیل صدق را فرمود رو مشت خاکی از زمین بستان گرو
english_translation: He commanded Gabriel the true saying Go take a handful of clay from the Earth as a pledge

persian_text: زلت او به ز طاعت نزد حق پیش کفرش جمله ایمانها خلق
english_translation: In the sight of God his backsliding is better than obedience beside his infidelity all faiths are tattered

persian_text: تا فرو آید بلا بیدافعی چون نباشد از تضرع شافعی
english_translation: In order that affliction may descend without anything to repel it when there is no intercessor of humble entreaty

persian_text: مدح حاضر وحشت است از بهر این نام موسی میبرم قاصد چنین
english_translation: To praise any one present is embarrassment on this account I am purposely using the name of Moses like this

persian_text: مطربانشان از درون دف میزنند بحرها در شورشان کف میزنند
english_translation: From within them musicians strike the tambourine at their ecstasy the seas burst into foam

persian_text: چون بکاری در زمین اصل کار تا بروید هر یکی را صد هزار
english_translation: When you sow sow in the soil of the Origin that for every single a hundred thousand may grow

persian_text: در نصیحت من شده بار دگر گفته امثال و سخنها چون شکر
english_translation: I went once more to admonition I spake parables and words as sugar

persian_text: گوش بیگوشی درین دم بر گشا بهر راز یفعل الله ما یشا
english_translation: At this moment open the ear of earlessness for the sake of the mystery of God doeth what He willeth

persian_text: باد سوزانت این آتش بدان پرتو آتش بود نه عین آن
english_translation: Know that this fire is a burning wind it is a ray of fire not the essence thereof

persian_text: گفت آریگر توکل رهبر است این سبب هم سنت پیغمبر است
english_translation: Yes he said  if trust in God is the guide the means too is the Prophets rule

persian_text: پس بپرسیدند ازو کای رهگذر از عزیر ما عجب داری خبر
english_translation: So they inquired of him saying O wayfarer we wonder if thou hast news of our Uzayr

persian_text: کین قران احمدست و دور او هین بگیرید امر او را اتقوا
english_translation: Saying This is the epoch and cycle of Ahmad  hark accept his command Have fear

persian_text: ور خورد خود فیالمثل دام و ددش گوشت عاشق زهر گردد بکشدش
english_translation: And if the wild beast devour him even parabolically the lovers flesh will become poison and kill him

persian_text: شد زنش را نسل از شوی دگر وآن یتیمانش ز مرگش در سمر
english_translation: His wife had offspring by another husband and his orphans used to talk of his death

persian_text: روشنی بر دفتر چارم بریز کفتاب از چرخ چارم کرد خیز
english_translation: Shed light upon the Fourth Book for the sun rose from the Fourth Heaven

persian_text: من همیلرزیدمی از بیم تو غافل از اکرام و از تعظیم تو
english_translation: I used to tremble in fear of thee being ignorant of thy gracious treatment and high regard

persian_text: تا نمیرد تن به یک زخم از گزاف تا خورد او بیست زخم اندر مصاف
english_translation: In order that his body might not die cheaply at one blow and that he might receive twenty blows in the battle

persian_text: گویدش ردوا لعادوا کار تستای تو اندر توبه و میثاق سست
english_translation: He will reply to him Thy case is   they were sent back  they would surely return  O thou who art weak in thy repentance and covenant

persian_text: چون ندارد مدرکی جز رنگ و بو جملهی اقلیمها را گو بجو
english_translation: Since he has no object of perception save colour and perfume  let him seek all the climes

persian_text: بار دیگر بر گمان طمع سود خویش زد بر آتش آن شمع زود
english_translation: Once more thinking and hoping to profit he quickly dashes himself on the fire of that candle

persian_text: حزم آن باشد که بر گیری تو آب تا رهی از ترس و باشی بر صواب
english_translation: It is prudence that you take water  so that you may be saved from dread and may be on the right

persian_text: بر نیایم یکتنه با سه نفر پس ببرمشان نخست از همدگر
english_translation: I cannot cope singly with three persons so first I will sunder them from one another

persian_text: اژدها بد مکر فرعون عنود مکر شاهان جهان را خورده بود
english_translation: The craft of the iniquitous Pharaoh was a dragon it had devoured the craft of the kings of the world

persian_text: سنگبر آهن زنی بیرون جهد هم به امر حق قدم بیرون نهد
english_translation: If you strike stone on iron it leaps out tis by Gods command that it puts forth its foot

persian_text: تا شود پیدا وقار و صبرشان کردشان پیش از نبوت حق شبان
english_translation: In order that their calmness and fortitude should be displayed God made them shepherds before prophethood

persian_text: تا بداند ملک را از مستعار وین رباط فانی از دارالقرار
english_translation: In order that it may know the possession from the loan and this perishable caravanseray from the everlasting abode

persian_text: صد هزار اندر هزار از مرد و زن پس چرا محروم ماندند از زمن
english_translation: Myriads on myriads of men and womenwhy then did they remain deprived of fortune

persian_text: هر دمی یعقوبوار از یوسفی میرسد اندر مشام تو شفا
english_translation: Thou to whose organ of smell there is coming at every moment as to Jacob balm from a Joseph

persian_text: همچو پرهای عقول انسیان که بسی فرق است شان اندر میان
english_translation: Just as the wings of human intellects amongst which there is great difference

persian_text: گر دو صد بارت بجوشم در عمل در کف جوشت نیابم یک دغل
english_translation: Though I boil thee in practice two hundred times I do not find any refuse in the foam of thy boiling

persian_text: باز میگشتند سوی شهریار پر ز گرد و روی زرد و شرمسار
english_translation: they were returning to the King covered with dust and palefaced and ashamed

persian_text: حقتعالی جهدشان را راست کرد آن چه دیدند از جفا و گرم و سرد
english_translation: God exalted is He prospered their exertion and what they suffered of oppression and heat and cold

persian_text: میوهی شیرین نهان در شاخ و برگ زندگی جاودان در زیر مرگ
english_translation: The sweet fruit is hidden in boughs and leaves the everlasting life is under death

persian_text: تا زبانم چون ترا نامی نهد چشم ازین دیده گواهیها دهد
english_translation: So that when my tongue bestows a name on thee my eye may give testimonies of this which I have seen

persian_text: او طبق بنهاد اندر پیش شیخ تو ببین اسرار سر اندیش شیخ
english_translation: The boy put the tray before the Shaykh Behold the mysterious secret thoughts of the Shaykh

persian_text: چون سگی بانگی بزد از سوی راست گفت میگوید که سلطان با شماست
english_translation: When a dog barked on the right said It says The Sultan is with you

persian_text: هیچ گندم کاری و جو بر دهد دیدهای اسبی که کرهی خر دهد
english_translation: Wilt thou sow wheat and will it produce barley Hast thou seen a mare bring forth an asss colt

persian_text: گر هزاران سال باشد عمر او او نگردد سیر خود از جست و جو
english_translation: Though his life be a thousand years never will he become weary of seeking

persian_text: آبگینهی زرد چون سازی نقاب زرد بینی جمله نور آفتاب
english_translation: When you make yellow glass a veil  you see all the sunlight yellow

persian_text: خود چه کم گشتی ز جود و رحمتشگر نبودی خرخشه در نعمتش
english_translation: How indeed would His munificence and mercy be diminished if in His bounty there were no torment

persian_text: آن بگوید دود هست و نار نی نور شمعی بی ز شمعی روشنی
english_translation: That one says There is smoke but no fire there is candlelight without any resplendent candle

persian_text: چون گواهی بندگان مقبول نیست عدل او باشد که بندهی غول نیست
english_translation: Inasmuch as the testimony of slaves is not accepted the approved witness is he that is not the slave of the ghoul

persian_text: گر چه جملهی این جهان ملک وی است ملک در چشم دل او لا شی است
english_translation: Although the whole of this world is his kingdom in the eye of his heart the kingdom is nothing

persian_text: گر زلیخا بست درها هر طرف یافت یوسف هم ز جنبش منصرف
english_translation: Though Zalíkhá shut the doors on every side still Joseph gained return by bestirring himself

persian_text: چون به جد حاکم بدو گفت این بکن گفت آری بر کنم روزیش من
english_translation: When the Governor said to him with earnestness Dig this up he replied Yes I will dig it up some day

persian_text: گفت او با خود که آن طعمهی توست که از آن اجزای تو زنده و نوست
english_translation: He said to himself That is your food whereby your limbs are revived and renewed

persian_text: بانگ میآمد کهای طالب بیا جود محتاج گدایان چون گدا
english_translation: A loud call was coming  Come O seeker Bounty is in need of beggars like a beggar

persian_text: گرد خود برگرد و جرم خود ببین جنبش از خود بین و از سایه مبین
english_translation: Circle round yourself and perceive your sin perceive that the movement proceeds from the sun and do not regard it as proceeding from the shadow

persian_text: بر در این خانه گستاخی ز چیستگر همیدانند کاندر خانه کیست
english_translation: Wherefore presumption at the door of this house if they know who is within the house

persian_text: همچنین اشکسته بسته گفتنیست حق کند آخر درستش کو غنیست
english_translation: It has to be uttered thus brokenly and in bandages God who is Selfsufficient will make it whole at last

persian_text: هست خاشاک تو صورتهای فکر نو به نو در میرسد اشکال بکر
english_translation: Your sticks and straws are the forms of thought virgin forms are always coming on anew

persian_text: گویدش ای مزبله تو کیستی یک دو روز از پرتو من زیستی
english_translation: Says to it O dunghill who art thou Through my beams thou hast come to life for a day or two

persian_text: از قزح در پیش مه بستی کمر زان همی رنجی ز وانشق القمر
english_translation: by Quzah thou hast girt thyself before the moon hence thou art vexed by and the moon shall be split asunder

persian_text: از برای امتحان آن مرد رفت در بیابان نزد کوهی خفت تفت
english_translation: By way of trial that man went into the desert and immediately lay down near a mountain

persian_text: کوه را غرقه کند یک خم ز نم منفذش چون باز باشد سوی یم
english_translation: A jar will submerge a mountain with water when the eye of the jar is open to the Sea

persian_text: تا ازینها پی بری سوی اصول تو برین قانع شدی ای بوالفضول
english_translation: that you may follow the track from these towards the origins but you are content with this  O trifler

persian_text: لیک هم بعضی از این هر دو اثر شرح باید کرد یعنی نفع و ضر
english_translation: But still some of these two effects must be explainedthat is the benefit and injury

persian_text: نه صدای بانگ مشتاقی در او نه صفای جرعهی ساقی در او
english_translation: Neither is there in it the echo of the cry of longing nor the purity of the draught of the Cupbearer

persian_text: مر وزیری را کند شه محتسب شه عدوی او بود نبود محب
english_translation: If the king make a vizier a police inspector the king is his enemy he is not his friend

persian_text: باغها و میوهها اندر دلست عکس لطف آن برین آب و گلست
english_translation: The orchards and fruits are within the heart the reflexion of their beauty is upon this water and earth

persian_text: آن دگر گفتی که بر نه نقش فاش بر درش کای میهمان اینجا مباش
english_translation: Another would say Put an inscription conspicuously on its doorO guest do not stay here

persian_text: شاد آن شاهی که او را دستگیر باشد اندر کار چون آصف وزیر
english_translation: Happy is the king whose helper in affairs is a vizier like Ásaf

persian_text: دم مزن تا بشنوی از دم ز نان آنچ نامد در زبان و در بیان

persian_text: پس حقیقت حق بود معبود کل کز پی ذوقست سیران سبل
english_translation: In truth then God is worshipped by all since wayfaring is for the sake of the pleasure

persian_text: هی کجا بودی برادر هیچ جا هی چه پختی بهر خوردن هیچ با
english_translation: Oh where hast thou been brother Nowhere Oh what hast thou cooked to eat No soup

persian_text: ز آنکه بر دل نقش تقلید است بند رو به آب چشم بندش را برند
english_translation: Inasmuch as the stamp of blind imitation is a lock upon the heartgo scrape off its lock with tears

persian_text: هین ببین کز تو نظر آید به کار باقیت شحمی و لحمی پود و تار

persian_text: گفت ویران گشت این خانه دریغ گفت اندر مه نگر منگر به میغ
english_translation: Alas she said this house has been ruined Look on the moon said he do not look on the cloud

persian_text: در بیان آنک حکما گویند آدمی عالم صغریست و حکمای اللهی گویند آدمی عالم کبریست زیرا آن علم حکما بر صورت آدمی مقصور بود و علم این حکما در حقیقت آدمی موصول
english_translation: Explaining that philosophers say that Man is the microcosm theosophists say that Man is the macrocosm the reason being that philosophy is confined to the phenomenal form of Man whereas theosophy is connected with the essential truth of his true nature

persian_text: از کمال رحمت و موج کرم میدهد هر شوره را باران و نم

persian_text: سخت بیرحمی و بس سنگیندلی که به صد شمشیر او را قاتلی
english_translation: You are very pitiless and exceedingly hardhearted for you are killing him with a hundred swords

persian_text: نان کجا اصلاح آن جانی کند کو دل از فرمان جانان بر کند

persian_text: ور بکلی بیمرادت داشتی دل شدی نومید امل کی کاشتی

persian_text: بیوفایی دان وفا با رد حق بر حقوق حق ندارد کس سبق

persian_text: عزم کرده که دلا آنجا مهایست گشته ناسی زانک اهل عزم نیست

persian_text: حد ندارد این سخن و آهوی ما میگریزد اندر آخر جابجا
english_translation: This discourse hath no bound and our gazelle is running to and fro in flight in the stable

persian_text: آن فلان قبه که در وی مشهدست پشت او در شهر و در در فدفدست
english_translation: suchandsuch a domed building in which there is a martyrs shrine with its back to the town and its gate towards the desert

persian_text: گفت امیر او را که اینها راست است لیک بخش تو ازینها کاست است

persian_text: بل قضا حقست و جهد بنده حق هین مباش اعور چو ابلیس خلق
english_translation: Nay destiny is a fact and the slaves exertion is a fact beware do not be blind of one eye like the tatterdemalion Iblís

persian_text: طبل و کوس هول باشد وقت جنگ وقت عشرت با خواص آواز چنگ

persian_text: عشق وصف ایزدست اما که خوف وصف بندهی مبتلای فرج و جوف
english_translation: Love is an attribute of God but fear is an attribute of the servant who is afflicted by lust and gluttony Love is an attribute of God but fear is an attribute of the servant who is afflicted by vulva and belly

persian_text: گفت ای شه هستم از دار السلام آمده از ره درین دار الملام

persian_text: دست من بنمود بر گردون هنر مقریا بر خوان که انشق القمر

persian_text: این نه میراث جهان فانی است که به انسابش بیابی جانی است
english_translation: This is not the heritage of the fleeting world so that thou shouldst gain it by ties of relationship tis a spiritual

persian_text: گر سلیمان را چنین مرغی بدی کی خود او مشغول آن مرغان شدی
english_translation: Had Solomon possessed a bird like this how indeed should he have become occupied with those birds

persian_text: بندگان دارند لابد خوی او مشکهاشان پر ز آب جوی او
english_translation: His servants necessarily possess His disposition their waterskins are filled from the water of His stream

persian_text: سر ز خفتن کی توان برداشتن با چنین صد تخم غفلت کاشتن

persian_text: دعوت ایشان صفیر مرغ دان که کند صیاد در مکمن نهان
english_translation: Know that their invitation is the birds whistle which the fowler gives concealed in place of ambush

persian_text: هین درین بازار گرم بینظیر کهنهها بفروش و ملک نقد گیر

persian_text: ای تن صدکاره ترک من بگو عمر من بردی کسی دیگر بجو
english_translation: O body with thy hundred concerns bid me farewell thou hast taken my life seek another

persian_text: تختهها بر ساق بست از چپ و راست تا گمان آید که او اشکستهپاست
english_translation: He tied splints on his shank left and right in order that it might be supposed that his leg was broken

persian_text: کاین فقیر خفته را جوییم هم کرد بیدارش ز غم صاحب درم

persian_text: گر ندیدی جنس خود کی آمدی کی به غیر جنس خود را بر زدی

persian_text: هیچ از مقصود اثر پیدا نشد ز آن غرض غیر خبر پیدا نشد

persian_text: بس کسان را کالت پیکار کشت بیرجولیت چنان تیغی به مشت
english_translation: Many are they whom implements of war have slain such a sword in their hands without the manhood

persian_text: ای که هر صبحی که از مشرق بتافت همچو چشمهی مشرقت در جوش یافت

persian_text: گریختن عیسی علیهالسلام فراز کوه از احمقان

persian_text: اغنیا مانندهی سرگینکشان بهر آتش کردن گرمابهبان

persian_text: یک اثر نه بر تن آن ذوفنون وان مریدان خسته و غرقاب خون

persian_text: چار مرغ معنوی راهزن کردهاند اندر دل خلقان وطن

persian_text: پس بگفتندش چه جای خنده است قحط بیخ مومنان بر کنده است

persian_text: این پذیرفتی بماندی زان دگر که محب از ضد محبوبست کر

persian_text: از غذای مختلف یا از طعام طبع شوریده همیبیند منام

persian_text: پس کلوا از بهر دام شهوتست بعد از آن لاتسرفوا آن عفتست

persian_text: گفت بنما تا ببیند این جسد تا چد حد حس نازکست و بیمدد

persian_text: این بمنگیدند در زیر زبان آن اسیران با هم اندر بحث آن

persian_text: نزد آنکه لم یذق دعوی است این نزد سکان افق معنی است این

persian_text: از مبدل بین وسایط را بمان کز وسایط دور گردی ز اصل آن

persian_text: آن زنان چون عقلها درباختند بر رواق عشق یوسف تاختند

persian_text: طفل حاجات شما را آفرید تا بنالید و شود شیرش پدید

english_translation: My desire will be attained either by this going forth or through some other gateway by Heaven

persian_text: وقت خودبینی نگنجد در جهان در گلو و معده گمگشته چو نان

persian_text: ور ز رش نور حق قسمیش داد همچو رسم مصر سرگین مرغزاد

persian_text: کار هادی این بود تو هادیی ماتم آخر زمان را شادیی
english_translation: This is the business of a guide thou art the Guide thou art the joy for the sorrow of the last time

persian_text: چون فکندی تیر از قوسای سعاد بر کن آن موضع که تیرت اوفتاد

persian_text: پس زمین و چرخ را دان هوشمند چونک کار هوشمندان میکنند
english_translation: Therefore regard earth and heaven as endowed with intelligence since they do the work of intelligent beings

english_translation: By reason you can recognise congener and noncongener you ought not to run at once to forms

persian_text: چون موکل آن ملایک پیش و پس بوده پنهان گشته پیدا چون عسس

english_translation: For a newborn child the father makes babbling sounds though his intellect may make a survey of the world

english_translation: I was a pain entirely selfsatisfied the King made me the remedy for every sufferer from pain

persian_text: تا شوم غرقهی مذلت من تمام تا سقطها بشنوم از خاص و عام
english_translation: That I may be completely overwhelmed with abasement and that I may hear abusive words from high and low

persian_text: این نشان راست دادم جان باب بر نویس الله اعلم بالصواب

persian_text: سفرهی او پیش این از نان تهیست پیش یعقوبست پر کو مشتهیست

persian_text: آن ضمان بر حق بود نه بر امین هست تفصیلش به فقه اندر مبین

persian_text: عاریهست این کم همیباید فشارد کانچ بگرفتی همیباید گزارد
english_translation: this is a loan thou needst not stuff so much for thou must needs pay back what thou hast taken

persian_text: گر دری بر بسته شد ده در گشادگر قجی شد حق عوض اشتر بداد
english_translation: If one door is shut ten doors are opened if a ram is gone God gives a camel in compensation

english_translation: He brought and placed before him wine and harp thereat he smiled faintly and was moderately pleased

persian_text: عقل باید نورده چون آفتاب تا زند تیغی که نبود جز صواب
english_translation: An intellect giving light like the sun is needed to wield the sword that never misses the right direction

persian_text: هر چه نفست خواست داری اختیار هر چه عقلت خواست آری اضطرار
english_translation: Whatever your fleshly soul desires you have freewill  whatever your reason desires you plead necessity

persian_text: هست هفتاد و دو علت در بدن از کششهای عناصر بی رسن
english_translation: There are twoandseventy diseases in the body by the elements pulling without cord

persian_text: چشم گریان بایدت چون طفل خرد کم خور آن نان را که نان آب تو برد
english_translation: You must needs have a weeping eye like the little child do not eat the bread  for that bread takes away your water

persian_text: گفت زن این گربه خورد آن گوشت را گوشت دیگر خر اگر باشد هلا
english_translation: This cat has eaten the meat she replied hey go and buy some more meat if you can

persian_text: هر یکی از وی مرادی خواست کرد جمله را وعده بداد آن نیکمرد
english_translation: Each one asked him for some object of desire that good man gave his promise to them all
