english_translation: The celestial mill bestows on those who have no wheat whiteness of hair and weakness in the loins

persian_text: طبل افلاسم به چرخ سابعه رفت و تو نشنیدهای بد واقعه
english_translation: The drum of my insolvency reached the Seventh Heaven and you have not heard the bad news

persian_text: خود نه آن بویست اینکه اندر جهان صد هزاران پردهاش دارد نهان
english_translation: In sooth this is not a scent that thousands of veils will keep hidden in the world

persian_text: چون دو چشم گاو در جرم تلف همچو یک چشمست کش نبود شرف
english_translation: Since the two eyes of an ox are as one eye in damages for destructionfor it hath no excellence

persian_text: زنده از تو شاد از تو عایلی مغتذی بیواسطه و بی حایلی
english_translation: Living by Thee rejoicing because of Thee a pauper receiving sustenance without any medium or intervention

persian_text: من بدم غافل بشغل قال و قیل بود در باطن چنین رنجی ثقیل
english_translation: I did not notice  through being busy with discourse  within there was such a severe malady

persian_text: پس کرم کن عذر را تعلیم ده برگشا از دست و پای من گره
english_translation: Do me a favour then teach me the excuse untie the knots from my hands and feet

persian_text: شاه گوید چونک گفتی این مقال یا بکن ثابت که دارم من عیال
english_translation: The King says  Since thou hast spoken these words either prove that I have a wife and family

persian_text: گفتم ار هر ذرهای خونی شود خنجر اندر کف به قصد تو رود
english_translation: I said If every atom should become a murderer and dagger in hand go to attack thee

persian_text: تا دو پر باشی که مرغ یک پره عاجز آید از پریدنای سره
english_translation: So that you may have two wings  for the bird that has one wing is unable to fly O excellent

persian_text: صد تدارک بود چون حاضر بدند این زمان هر یک به اقلیمی شدند
english_translation: There were a hundred ways of mending when they were present now each one is gone to a clime

persian_text: گفت من مستسقیم آبم کشد گرچه میدانم که هم آبم کشد
english_translation: He said I am dropsical the water draws me though I know that the water too will kill me

persian_text: جواب دهری کی منکر الوهیت است و عالم را قدیم میگوید
english_translation: Reply to the materialist who disbelieves in the Deity and says that the world is eternal

persian_text: حله میپرد ز من در امتحان همچو برگ از نخ در فصل خزان
english_translation: My robes are flying from me in tribulation like leaves from the datepalm in the season of autumn

persian_text: فرق بنهادم میان خیر و شر فرق بنهادم ز بد هم از بتر
english_translation: I have laid down a distinction between good and evil I have also laid down a distinction between the bad and the worse

persian_text: تفرقه در روح حیوانی بود نفس واحد روح انسانی بود
english_translation: Separation is in the animal spirit the human spirit is one essence

persian_text: تو مگو گندم چرا شد سوی جو چشم را بر خصم نه نی بر گرو
english_translation: Do not say Why did the wheat go to the barley Fix your eye on the holder not on that which he holds in pawn

persian_text: که رسم یا نارسیده ماندهام ای عجب با من کند کرم آن کرم
english_translation: Saying Shall I attain  or am I left immature Oh I wonder will the Vine bestow that bounty on me

persian_text: کو کسی که پیش شه بندد کمر تا کسی که هست بیرون سوی در
english_translation: Where is one that girds himself before the king to one that is outside the door

persian_text: این سال وآن جوابست آن گزین که سر اینها ندارد درد دین
english_translation: That pick out is dialectic for religious emotion has no care for these things

persian_text: چون محک دیدی سیه گشتی چو قلب نقش شیری رفت و پیدا گشت کلب
english_translation: When thou sawest the touchstone thou becamest black like adulterated coin the leonine figure vanished and the dog was revealed

persian_text: زان همیبرم گلویی چند تا زان گلوها عالمی یابد رها
english_translation: I cut some throats in order that a world may obtain deliverance from those throats

persian_text: ان بعض الظن اثم استای وزیر نیست استم راست خاصه بر فقیر
english_translation: Verily some suspicion is a sin O Vizier injustice is not right especially to a poor man

persian_text: مثل قانع شدن آدمی به دنیا و حرص او در طلب و غفلت او از دولت روحانیان کی ابنای جنس ویاند و نعرهزنان کی یا لیت قومی یعلمون
english_translation: Parable of Mans being contented with this world and his greed in seeking and his indifference to the high and blessed estate of the spiritual who are his congeners crying Oh would that my people might know

persian_text: گفت صاحبخانه نان اینجا کجاست خیرهای کی این دکان نانباست
english_translation: The owner of the house said Where is bread in this place Are you crazy How is this a bakers shop

persian_text: پس نشانیها که اندر انبیاست خاص آن جان را بود کاو آشناست
english_translation: Hence the signs which are in the prophets are peculiar to him who is a friend

persian_text: هر که او بیدارتر پر دردتر هر که او آگاهتر رخ زردتر
english_translation: The more wakeful any one is the more full of suffering he is the more aware he is the paler he is in countenance

persian_text: گر امین آیید سوی اهل راز وا رهید از سر کله مانند باز
english_translation: If ye come loyally to the possessors of the mystery ye will be freed from the hood like a falcon

persian_text: بسط دیدی بسط خود را آب ده چون بر آید میوه با اصحاب ده
english_translation: You have felt the expansion water your expansion and when the fruit appears give it to your friends

persian_text: خر ز بهر دفع خار از سوز و درد جفته میانداخت صد جا زخم کرد
english_translation: In order to get rid of the thorn the donkey from irritation and pain went on kicking and dealing blows in a hundred places

persian_text: گر مراقب باشی و بیدار تو بینی هر دم پاسخ کردار تو
english_translation: If thou wilt be observant and vigilant thou wilt see at every moment the response to thy action

persian_text: جان به حق پیوست چون بیهوش شد موج رحمت آن زمان در جوش شد
english_translation: His soul became united with God at the moment when he lost consciousness the waves of Mercy began to surge

persian_text: موسیی فرعون را با رود نیل میکشد با لشکر و جمع ثقیل
english_translation: A Moses kills Pharaoh with his army and mighty host by means of the river Nile

persian_text: حکم کردن داود علیهالسلام برکشندهی گاو
english_translation: How David on whom be peace gave judgement against the slayer of the cow

persian_text: او نمیدانست گرد گرگ را با چنین دانش چرا کرد او چرا
english_translation: Did not he know the wolfs dust  with such knowledge why did he graze

persian_text: نقل باشد نه چو نقل جان عام همچو نقلی از مقامی تا مقام
english_translation: Translation it is not like the translation of the spirits of the vulgar it resembles a removal from one place to another

persian_text: باز بگریزی ز راه روشنی آن سلاح علم و فن را بفکنی
english_translation: Once more you flee from the Way of Light and cast off that armour of knowledge and virtue

persian_text: خوش کننده ست و خوش و عین خوشی بیخوشی نبود خوشیای مرتشی
english_translation: It is a doer of sweet and sweet and the essence of sweetness Without sweetness there is no sweetness O taker of bribes

persian_text: ریزهریزه صدق هر روزه چرا جمع میناید در این انبار ما
english_translation: Why is the daily sincerity not being stored bit by bit in this barn of ours

persian_text: دست نه تا دست جنباند به دفع نطق نه تا دم زند در ضر و نفع
english_translation: There is no power that he should move a hand in defence no speech that he should utter a word concerning injury or benefit

persian_text: وصف حق کو وصف مشتی خاک کو وصف حادث کو وصف پاک کو
english_translation: What relation exists between the attributes of God and those of a handful of earth What relation exists between the attributes of him who is originated in time and those of the Holy One

persian_text: حرفگو و حرفنوش و حرفها هر سه جان گردند اندر انتها
english_translation: The speaker of the word and the hearer of the word and the words all three become spirit in the end

persian_text: عاشقی که آلوده شد در خیر و شر خیر و شر منگر تو در همت نگر
english_translation: the lover who is soiled with good and evil do not regard the good and evil regard the aspiration

persian_text: أنت مولی القوم من لا یشتهی قد ردی کلا لئن لم ینته
english_translation: Thou art the protector of the people He that desires not hath gone to perdition Nay verily if he do not refrain

persian_text: زین روش بر اوج انور میروی ای برادرگر بر آذر میروی
english_translation: By means of this wayfaring you will ascend to the most luminous zenith O brother if you will walk on the fire

persian_text: آن یکی میرفت بالای درخت میفشاند آن میوه را دزدانه سخت
english_translation: A certain man was climbing up a tree and vigorously scattering the fruit in the manner of thieves

persian_text: آفتاب شرق شب را طی کند از نهنگ آن خوردهها را قی کند
english_translation: And the orient sun rolls up night this leviathan spews out all that it swallowed

persian_text: شد چنین شیخی گدای کو به کو عشق آمد لاابالی اتقوا
english_translation: A Shaykh like this became a beggar from street to street Love is reckless beware

persian_text: زار و رنجورست و درویش و ضعیف سه درم در بایدش تره و رغیف
english_translation: he is weak and ill and poor and infirm he will need three dirhems for vegetables and loaves

persian_text: گفت رو مه تو رهی مه آینت دایما در بغض و کینی و عنت
english_translation: Begone said he may neither you nor your mirror be saved You are always in hatred and malice and sin

persian_text: او ذکر را از زنان پنهان کند تا که خود را خواهر ایشان کند
english_translation: Penem oculis feminarum subtrahit ut sese earum sororem faciat He hides penis from women in order to make himself their sister

persian_text: خواب را یزدان بدان سان میکند کز دو عالم فکر را بر میکند
english_translation: God makes sleep to be in such a manner that it erases thought of the two worlds

persian_text: آن دگر گوید دروغست این بران که بهر شب چشمهای بینی روان
english_translation: Another may say This is false push on for you will find a running fountain every night

persian_text: کودکان خانه دمش میکشند باشد اندر دست طفلان خوارمند
english_translation: the children of the house keep pulling his tail he will be humble in the childrens hands

persian_text: گندمی خورشید آدم را کسوف چون ذنب شعشاع بدری را خسوف
english_translation: A grain of wheat eclipsed the sun of Adam as the descending node is eclipse to the brilliance of the fullmoon

persian_text: این جهان زندان و ما زندانیان حفره کن زندان و خود را وارهان
english_translation: This world is the prison and we are the prisoners dig a hole in the prison and let yourself out

persian_text: چونک هر جزوی بجوید ارتفاق چون بود جان غریب اندر فراق
english_translation: Inasmuch as every part seeks support what must be the state of the soul a stranger in separation

persian_text: بانگ کردند اهل کشتی کای همام از چه دادندت چنین عالیمقام
english_translation: The people in the ship cried out O noble chief wherefore has such a high estate been given to thee

persian_text: جمله دانند این اگر تو نگروی هر چه میکاریش روزی بدروی
english_translation: if you may not believe  all know this one day you will reap whatsoever you are sowing

persian_text: در عیادت شد رسول بیندید آن صحابی را به حال نزع دید
english_translation: The peerless Prophet went to visit the sick man he found that Companion at the last gasp

persian_text: داند این را هرکه ز اصحاب نهاست که نهاد من فزونتر از شماست
english_translation: Whoever is one of those possessed of intelligence knows this that my nature is superior to yours

persian_text: خیرها نغزند نه از عکس غیر تاب حرص ار رفت ماند تاب خیر
english_translation: Good works are beautiful  not through the re flexion of any other thing if the glow of greed is gone the glow of good remains

persian_text: گر نه تصویرات از یک مغرساند در پی هم سوی دل چون میرسند
english_translation: If ideas are not from one Plantation how are they coming to the heart on each others heels

persian_text: در بیان آنک مرد بدکار چون متمکن شود در بدکاری و اثر دولت نیکوکاران ببیند شیطان شود و مانع خیر گردد
english_translation: Explaining that when the evildoer becomes settled in evildoing and sees the effect of the fortune of the doers of righteousness he from envy becomes a devil and preventer of good like Satan

persian_text: این خمار اشکوفهی آن دانه است آن شناسد کاگه و فرزانه است
english_translation: This cropsickness is the blossom of that seed he that is sagacious and wise will recognise it

persian_text: این چه ناشکری و چه بیباکیست تو نمیدانی که نقاشش کیست
english_translation: What ingratitude and what recklessness is this Dost not thou know who is their decorator

persian_text: علت و پرهیز شد بحران نماند کفر او ایمان شد و کفران نماند
english_translation: Sickness and abstinence are gone the crisis is past his infidelity has become faith and disbelief is no more

persian_text: کاش جانت کش روان من فدی از ضمیر جان من واقف بدی
english_translation: Would that thy soul to which my soul is devoted were aware of my souls inmost thoughts

persian_text: بر عدم باشم نه بر موجود مست زانک معشوق عدم وافیترست
english_translation: I am drunken with desire for nonexistence not for the existent because the Beloved of nonexistence is more faithful

persian_text: آن محمد خفته و تکیه زده آمده سر گرد او گردان شده
english_translation: Mohammed went to sleep and reclined  the secret came and circled round him

persian_text: نفخ صور امرست از یزدان پاک که بر آرید ای ذرایر سر ز خاک
english_translation: The blast of the trumpet is the command from the Holy God namely O children  lift up your heads from the grave

persian_text: و آن یکی سه ماه میبیند به هم این سه کس بنشسته یک موضع نعم
english_translation: And another beholds three moons together These three persons are seated in one place yea

persian_text: آن دماغی که بر آن گلشن تند چشم یعقوبان هم او روشن کند
english_translation: The brain that haunts yon Rosegardentis it that makes bright the eyes of Jacobs

persian_text: گر گران وگر شتابنده بود آنک جویندست یابنده بود
english_translation: Whether one be slow or speedy  he that is a seeker will be a finder

persian_text: گر بهر زخمی تو پر کینه شوی پس کجا بیصیقل آیینه شوی
english_translation: If thou art enraged by every blow then how wilt thou become a mirror without being polished

persian_text: زین حجاب این تشنگان کفپرست ز آب صافی اوفتاده دوردست
english_translation: Because of this veil these thirsty ones who are fond of the foam have got out of reach of the pure Water

persian_text: اندر افتادند در لوت آن نفر قحط دیده مرده از جوع البقر
english_translation: That folk fell to the food since they had suffered famine and were dead from ravenous hunger

persian_text: آن خلیفه گول هم یک چند نیز ریش گاوی کرد خوش با آن کنیز
english_translation: That foolish Caliph too was mightily infatuated for awhile with that girl

persian_text: اولین خون در جهان ظلم و داد از کف قابیل بهر زن فتاد
english_translation: The first blood in this world of iniquity and justice was shed by Qábíl for the sake of a woman

persian_text: روستایی بین که از بدنیتی میکند بعد اللتیا والتی
english_translation: See how the countryman from evil intent still inflicts calamities small and great

persian_text: چون کف موسی به امر کردگار نک برآرم من ز سحر او دمار
english_translation: Lo by command of the Creator I like the hand of Moses will utterly destroy her sorcery

persian_text: راستان را حاجت سوگند نیست ز انکه ایشان را دو چشمروشنی است
english_translation: The righteous have no need of oath because they have two clear eyes

persian_text: ترک کن این جبر را که بس تهیست تا بدانی سر سر جبر چیست
english_translation: Abandon this Necessitarianism which is very empty  in order that you may know what is the inmost secret of Necessity

persian_text: وان سگ آگاه از شاه وداد خود سگ کهفش لقب باید نهاد
english_translation: And the dog that is acquainted with the loving Kingeven him you must entitle the Dog of the Cave

persian_text: شیخ آگه بود و واقف از ضمیر گفت او را چند باشی در زحیر
english_translation: The Shaykh was aware and acquainted with his secret thoughts he said to him How long wilt thou remain in torment

persian_text: مادر ار گوید ترا مرگ تو باد مرگ آن خو خواهد و مرگ فساد
english_translation: If your mother say to you Mayst thou die she wishes the death of that nature and the death of iniquity

persian_text: گر رسد جذبهی خدا آب معین چاه ناکنده بجوشد از زمین
english_translation: if the pull of God come  the running water will bubble up from the earth without thy well having been dug

persian_text: آن نبد بیگار کسبی بود چست هر یکی دانه که کشتم صد برست
english_translation: Twas not labour without hire twas an excellent earning every grain that I sowed a hundred grew

persian_text: عشقبشکافد فلک را صد شکاف عشق لرزاند زمین را از گزاف
english_translation: Love cleaves the sky with a hundred clefts Love unconscionably makes the earth to tremble

persian_text: بر دل عاقل هزاران غم بودگر ز باغ دل خلالی کم شود
english_translation: Thousands of griefs lie on a wise mans heart if from the garden of his heart a toothpick fail

persian_text: گفتم آخر چون مرا بشناختند پیش ازین بر من نظر ننداختند
english_translation: Why said I  how did they recognise me They never set eyes on me before this

persian_text: چون ستد زو نان بگفت ای مستعان خوش به خان و مان خود بازش رسان
english_translation: On receiving some bread from him he cried O Thou whose help is besought bring him back happy to his home and household

persian_text: گفت پیغمبر که هست از امتم کاو بود هم گوهر و هم همتم
english_translation: The Prophet said Amongst my people are some who are one with me in nature and aspiration

persian_text: بر امید زندهای کن اجتهاد کو نگردد بعد روزی دو جماد
english_translation: Do thou exert thyself in hope of the Living One who does not become lifeless after a day or two

persian_text: مارگیر آن اژدها را بر گرفت سوی بغداد آمد از بهر شگفت
english_translation: The snakecatcher took up that snake and came to Baghdád for the sake of astonishment

persian_text: در صفت ناید عجایبهای آن تو درین ظلمت چهای در امتحان
english_translation: Its marvels come not into description why art thou in tribulation in this darkness

persian_text: چون بتابد تف آن خورشید جشم کوه گردد گاه ریگ و گاه پشم
english_translation: when the heat of the angry Sun flames  the mountain becomes now sand and now wool

persian_text: دور میبینی سراب و میدوی عاشق آن بینش خود میشوی
english_translation: You see the mirage far away and run  you become in love with your own sight

persian_text: آدما آن الف از بوی تو بود ز آنکه جسمت را زمین بد تار و پود
english_translation: O Adam that friendship was owing to the scent of thee because earth was the woof and warp of thy body

persian_text: حکایت شیخ محمد سررزی غزنوی قدس الله سره
english_translation: Story of Shaykh Mohammed Sarrazí of Ghazna may God sanctify his spirit

persian_text: کس درینجا نیست جز دیو و پری روزگار خود چه یاوه میبری
english_translation: There is nobody here except demons and spirits why art thou trifling thy time away

persian_text: مینماید بر تو زشتی گنه میکنی نیت که باز آیم به ره
english_translation: The foulness of your sin is shown to you you resolve to come back to the way

persian_text: اشکال آوردن بر این قصه
english_translation: On raising a difficulty as to this story

persian_text: آفت این در هوا و شهوت است ور نه اینجا شربت اندر شربت است
english_translation: The bane of this gate is sensuality and lust else draught on draught is here

persian_text: گفت با هامان بگویم ای ستیر شاه را لازم بود رای وزیر
english_translation: He said I will tell Hámán O veiled one the counsel of the vizier is necessary to the king

persian_text: این چرا کردم چرا دادم پیام سوختم بیچاره را زین گفت خام
english_translation: Why did I do this Why did I give the message I have consumed the poor creature by this raw speech

persian_text: چون که گل بگذشت و گلشن شد خراب بوی گل را از که یابیم از گلاب
english_translation: Since the rose is past and the garden ravaged from whom shall we get the perfume of the rose From rosewater

persian_text: این سر خر در میان قندزار ای بسا کس را که بنهادست خار
english_translation: Oh there is many a one in whom this donkeys head amidst the sugar plantation has fixed a thorn

persian_text: از نبی برخوان که شیطانان انس گشتهاند از مسخ حق با دیو جنس
english_translation: Read in the Qurán how by Divine transformation the devils of mankind have become homogeneous with the Devil

persian_text: بسته بودش با رسنهای غلیظ احتیاطی کرده بودش آن حفیظ
english_translation: He had bound it with thick ropes that careful keeper had taken great precaution for it

persian_text: چون ز دستت رست ایثار و زکات گشت این دست آن طرف نخل و نبات
english_translation: When altruism and almsgiving have grown up from your hand this hand becomes on yonder side datepalms and herbage

persian_text: بود هاروت از ملاک آسمان از عتابی شد معلق همچنان
english_translation: Hárút was one of the angels of Heaven on account of a rebuke he was suspended thus

persian_text: نور رویش آنچنان بردی بصر که زمرد از دو دیدهی مار کر
english_translation: The splendour of his face would have dazzled eyes as the emerald the eyes of the deaf adder

persian_text: تا به طمع آن دلت نیت کند بار دیگر نیتت را بشکند
english_translation: In order that through hope of that  your heart may form an intention and that He may once more destroy your intention

persian_text: وصف حق دان آن فراست را نه وهم نور دل از لوح کل کردست فهم
english_translation: Deem that sagacity to be a Divine attribute not a suspicion the light of the heart has apprehended from the Universal Tablet

persian_text: دشمنی آن دل از روز الست سبزوار طبع را میراثی است
english_translation: From the Day of Alast there is an hereditary enmity of that Heart to the Sabzawár of the carnal nature

persian_text: همچو آن اصحاب فیل اندر حبش کعبهای کردند حق آتش زدش
english_translation: Even as the Lords of the Elephant in Abyssinia made a Kaba God set it afire

persian_text: گیر در رویت نمالد از کرم هر چه گویی خندد و گوید نعم
english_translation: Suppose that from kindness he does not rebuke you to your face whatever you say he smiles and says Yes

persian_text: یا امید باز گشتنتان نبود وعدهی امروز باطلتان نمود
english_translation: Or had ye no hope of returning Did the promise of today seem vain to you

persian_text: که اعذنی خالقی من شره لا تحرمنی انل من بره
english_translation: Saying O my Creator preserve me from its evil do not deprive me let me partake of its good

persian_text: گر بگویی احولی را مه یکی است گویدت این دوست و در وحدت شکی است
english_translation: If you say to a squinting man The moon is one he will say to you These are two  and there is a doubt as to being one

persian_text: لیک سرخی بر رخی که آن لامعست بهر آن آمد که جانش قانعست
english_translation: But the redness on a face that is beaming appears because his soul is content

persian_text: دیو ننموده و را هم نقش خویش او همیگوید ز ابدالیم و بیش
english_translation: The Devil has not shown to him even his portrait he is saying We are of the Abdál and are more

persian_text: پردههای دیده را داروی صبر هم بسوزد هم بسازد شرح صدر
english_translation: The medicine of patience will burn the veils over your eye and will also effect the opening of your breast

persian_text: گفت شیر آری ولی رب العباد نردبانی پیش پای ما نهاد
english_translation: Yes said the lion but the Lord of His servants set a ladder before our feet

persian_text: صد سال و صد جواب اندر دلت میرسد از لامکان تا منزلت
english_translation: Within thy heart a hundred questions and a hundred answers are coming from nonspatiality to thy dwellingplace

persian_text: اینچنین حسها و ادراکات ما قطرهای باشد در آن نهر صفا
english_translation: Our senses and perceptions such as they are are a single drop in that pure river

persian_text: حکایت آن گاو کی تنها در جزیره ایست بزرگ
english_translation: Story of the cow that is alone in a great island

persian_text: فانتقمنا منهم استای گرگ پیر چون نبودی مرده در پیش امیر
english_translation: Tis So we took vengeance on them O old wolf inasmuch as thou wert not dead in the presence of the Amír

persian_text: تا کف دریا نیاید سوی خاک که اصل او آمد بود در اصطکاک
english_translation: The seafoam is in collision till it comes to the earth which is its origin

persian_text: بازگونه کردهای معنیش را کفر گفتی مستعد شو نیش را
english_translation: Thou hast perverted its meaning thou hast uttered blasphemy prepare thyself for the sting

persian_text: ور نداند زشت کردن ناقص است زین سبب خلاق گبر و مخلص است
english_translation: And if he cannot make the ugly he is deficient hence He is the Creator of the infidel and the sincere

persian_text: مردی این مردیست نه ریش و ذکر ورنه بودی شاه مردان کیر خر
english_translation: Virilitas haec virilitas est barba et penis non est sin minus rex virorum esset veretrum asini Manhood is this manliness not a beard and a penis otherwise an asss penis would be the king of men

persian_text: نازنین یاری که بعد از مرگ تو رشتهی یاری او گردد سه تو
english_translation: The delectable Friend whose friendships cord becomes threefold after thy death

persian_text: هرچه بینم اندرو غیر خدا آن من نبود بود عکس گدا
english_translation: When I see in it anything other than God it is not mine but is reflected from the beggar

persian_text: عمره کردی عمر باقی یافتی صاف گشتی بر صفا بشتافتی
english_translation: thou hast performed the lesser pilgrimage and gained the life everlasting thou hast become pure and sped up Purity

persian_text: گفت خواجه مال را نبود ثبات روز آید شب رود اندر جهات
english_translation: The Khwája said  Wealth has no permanence it comes in the morning and at night it goes in all directions

persian_text: ای حریفان من از آنها نیستم کز خیالاتی درین ره بیستم
english_translation: O comrades I am not one of those  that because of idle fancies I should halt on the Way

persian_text: گر بخواهی ور نخواهی رزق تو پیش تو آید دوان از عشق تو
english_translation: whether you will or no your daily bread comes running to you because it is fond of you

persian_text: کس نداند روسپیزن کیست آن وانک داند نیستش بر خود گمان
english_translation: Nobody knows who is the cuckold and he that knows has no doubt concerning himself

persian_text: بهر اظهارست این خلق جهان تا نماند گنج حکمتها نهان
english_translation: these creatures of the world is for the purpose of manifestation to the end that the treasure of providences may not remain hidden

persian_text: خواجه را گفتند لقمان خورد آن خواجه بر لقمان ترش گشت و گران
english_translation: And told their master that Luqmán had eaten it the master became bitter and sorely displeased with Luqmán

persian_text: لابه کردی در نماز و در دعا کای خداوند و نگهبان رعا
english_translation: Used to beseech in prayer and invocation crying O Lord and Guardian of the shepherds

persian_text: گفت ای ستار بر مگشای راز سرببسته میخرم با من بساز
english_translation: He said  O Veiler  do not reveal the secret  I will buy it with the lid on come to terms with me

persian_text: این شنیدی مو به مویت گوش باد آب حیوان است خوردی نوش باد
english_translation: You have heard this  may the whole of you hair by hair be an ear  Tis the Water of Life you have drunk may it do you good

persian_text: هم ز دورش بنگر و اندر گذر خوردن و بو را نشایدای پسر
english_translation: Look at them from afar and pass on they are not fit for eating or smelling O son

persian_text: گفت پالانش فرو نه پیش پیش داروی منبل بنه بر پشت ریش
english_translation: The Súfí said First of all take off his saddle and put the salve of manbal on his sore back

persian_text: هست شاهان را زمانبر نشست هول سرهنگان و صارمها به دست
english_translation: Kings when seated on the throne have formidable guardsmen with swords in their hands

persian_text: این و صد چندینی ای صادق ولیک شرح کن این را بیان کن نیک نیک
english_translation: Thou art this and a hundred times as much O veracious one but expound this and explain it very well

persian_text: وا رهیدی از حوالهی جا به جا اندرین کاشان پر خوف و رجا
english_translation: you escape from being transferred from place to place in this Káshán filled with fear and hope

persian_text: شیر داد و پرورش اطفال را چشمه کرده سینهی هر زال را
english_translation: He hath given milk and nourishment for babes He hath made the breast of every wife a fountain

persian_text: رو ز درمان دروغین میگریز تا شود دردت مصیب و مشکبیز
english_translation: Go always be fleeing from the false remedy in order that thy passion may be successful and rich in perfume

persian_text: باز با خود گفت صبر اولیترست صبر تا مقصود زوتر رهبرست
english_translation: Again he said to himself Patience is better patience is the quickest guide to the object of ones quest

persian_text: یک نشان آدم آن بود از ازل که ملایک سر نهندش از محل
english_translation: One mark of Adam from eternity was this that the angels should lay their heads before him because it was his place

persian_text: از سواد شب برون آرد نهار وز کف معسر برویاند یسار
english_translation: He brings forth day from the blackness of night and makes ease to grow from the hand of him who suffers hardship

persian_text: صدق موسی بر عصا و کوه زد بلک بر دریای پر اشکوه زد
english_translation: The sincerity of Moses made an impression on the rod and the mountain nay on the majestic sea

persian_text: اینت دریایی نهان در زیر کاه پا بر اینکه هین منه با اشتباه
english_translation: Here is an ocean hidden beneath straw beware do not step on this straw with hesitancy

persian_text: تو مثال دوزخی او مومن است کشتن آتش به مومن ممکن است
english_translation: You are like Hell he is a true believer the extinction of the fire by means of a true believer is possible

persian_text: بیتعلق نیست مخلوقی بدو آن تعلق هست بیچونای عمو
english_translation: No created being is unconnected with Him that connexion O uncle is indescribable

persian_text: دست دیگر باختن فرمود میر او چنان لرزان که عور از زمهریر
english_translation: The Prince commanded him to play a second game he was trembling like a naked man in bitter cold

persian_text: خویشتن را ترش و غمگین ساخت او نردهای بازگونه باخت او
english_translation: He made himself out to be bitterly annoyed and grieved he played reversed dice

persian_text: شوم ساعت که شدم بر تو پدیدای خنک آن را که روی تو ندید
english_translation: Illomened the hour I came into your sight oh happy he that never saw your face

persian_text: پس مسلمان گفت ای یاران من پیشم آمد مصطفی سلطان من
english_translation: Then the Moslem said O my friends to me came Mustafá  my sovereign

persian_text: این شه ترمد ازو در وهم بود وز فن دلقک خود آن وهمش فزود
english_translation: This King of Tirmid was apprehensive of him and his apprehension was increased by the artifice of Dalqak

persian_text: گر همی دانی ره نیکو پرست ور ندانی چون بدانی کین به دست
english_translation: If thou knowest the good way worship  and if thou dost not know  how dost thou know that this way is evil

persian_text: چون نماند خانهها را قاعده مومنان مانند نفس واحده
english_translation: When the houses have no foundation remaining the Faithful remain one soul

persian_text: رحم کرد این گرگ و ز عذر لبق آمده که إنا ذهبنا نستبق
english_translation: This wolf took pity  and by way of specious excuse came  Lo we went to compete with one another

persian_text: صدقه نبود سوختن درویش را کور کردن چشم حلماندیش را
english_translation: Tis not almsgiving to burn a poor man and to blind the eye that meditates on forbearance

persian_text: بارها پوشد پی اظهار فضل باز گیرد از پی اظهار عدل
english_translation: He covers up many times in order to manifest His grace then again He chastises in order to manifest His justice

persian_text: میکشاندشان سوی کسب و شکار میکشاندشان سوی کان و بحار
english_translation: It drags them to earning and hunting it drags them to the mine and the seas

persian_text: ز آشنایی خیزد این بغض و ولا وز غذای خویش بود سقم و قوی
english_translation: This hatred and love arise from acquaintance and from wholesome food sickness and powers

persian_text: گر قضا انداخت ما را در عذاب کی رود آن خو و طبع مستطاب
english_translation: If Destiny has cast me into torment how should that goodly disposition and nature depart

persian_text: گشت مهمان رسول آن شب عرب شیر یک بز نیمه خورد و بست لب
english_translation: The Arab became the Prophets guest that night he drank half the milk of a single goat and closed his lips

persian_text: تا ز جرمت هم خدا عفوی کند زلتت را مغفرت در آکند
english_translation: In order that God may pardon thy sins likewise and heap forgiveness on thy faults

persian_text: گفتم آخر غرق تست این عقل و جان گفت رو رو بر من این افسون مخوان
english_translation: I said After all this mind and soul are drowned in Thee Begone said He begone Do not chant these spells over Me

persian_text: گر چو خفته گشت و شد ناسی ز پیش کی گذارندش در آن نسیان خویش
english_translation: Though he fell asleep and became oblivious of the past how should they leave him in that selfforgetfulness

persian_text: متصل نبود سفال دو چراغ نورشان ممزوج باشد در مساغ
english_translation: The earthenware of two lamps are not joined but their light is mingled in passage

persian_text: مومن آن باشد که اندر جزر و مد کافر از ایمان او حسرت خورد
english_translation: The true believer is he by whose true belief amidst the ebb and flow the infidel is made regretful

persian_text: اصل آب نطفه اسپید است و خوش لیک عکس جان رومی و حبش
english_translation: Principium aquae seminis candidum est et pulchrum but the reflexion of the spirit Anatolian or Ethiopian The original seminal fluid is white and fair but the reflexion of the spirit Anatolian or Ethiopian

persian_text: تا که جنبشهای موزون سر کند جنبش مس را به دانش زر کند
english_translation: Until regulated movements appear and he by means of knowledge turns the motion of copper into gold

persian_text: که تو آن هوشی و باقی هوشپوش خویشتن را گم مکن یاوه مکوش
english_translation: For thou art that intelligence and the rest is a mask concealing the intelligence Do not lose thy self do not strive in vain

persian_text: این شنیدم لیک پیری مرتعش دست لرزان جسم تو نا منتعش
english_translation: I heard this  but you are a shaky old man your hand is trembling and your body is not erect

persian_text: مسجد روز گل است و روز ابر مسجد روز ضرورت وقت فقر
english_translation: It is a mosque for muddy and cloudy days a mosque for days of sore distress in times of poverty

persian_text: کوری تو حق مرا خود برگزید سرنگون شد آنچ نفست میپزید
english_translation: In despite of thee God Himself chose me out that which thy soul was concocting was overthrown

persian_text: پس ملک گوید که آن روضهی خضر که فلان جا دیدهاید اندر گذر
english_translation: Then the angel will say The garden of greenery which ye saw in a certain spot as ye passed

persian_text: گر نماند اشتهای نان و آب بدهدت بی این دو قوت مستطاب
english_translation: If you have no more appetite for bread and water He will give you goodly nourishment without these twain

persian_text: گفت را آموخت زان مرد هنر لیک از معنی و سرش بیخبر
english_translation: It learned to talk from that accomplished man but it is ignorant of his meaning and mystery

persian_text: بس گمان و وهم آید در ضمیر کان نباشد حق و صادقای امیر
english_translation: Many a thought and fancy that is not real and true comes into the mind O Prince

persian_text: سر از آن خواب مبارک بر نداشت تا نماز صبحدم آمد به چاشت
english_translation: He did not raise his head from that blessed sleep until the dawn prayer had advanced to forenoon

persian_text: این نکردست او وگر کرد او رواست هر چه خواهد گو بکن محبوب ماست
english_translation: He has not done this thing and if he has tis right let him do whatever he will he is my beloved

persian_text: او بدعوی میل دولت میکند معدهاش نفرین سبلت میکند
english_translation: He  by his pretension desires to be rich his belly is execrating his moustache

persian_text: شناختن هر حیوانی بوی عدو خود را
english_translation: How every animal knows the smell of its enemy

persian_text: بر هوا تاویل قرآن میکنی پست و کژ شد از تو معنی سنی
english_translation: Thou interpretest the Qurán according to thy desire by thee the sublime meaning is degraded and perverted

persian_text: با گل انداینده اسگالید گل دستکاری میکند پنهان ز دل
english_translation: Did the clay devise against the Plasterer Is the hand doing any work that is hidden from the heart

persian_text: تا شود شب از جمالت همچو روزای جمالت آفتاب جان فروز
english_translation: In order that by thy beauty night may be made like day O thou whose beauty is a soulillumining sun

persian_text: گر نداری از نفاق و بد امان از چه داری بر برادر ظن همان
english_translation: If thou hast no protection from hypocrisy and wickedness wherefore shouldst thou impute the same to thy brother

persian_text: گر بگوید زان بلغزد پای تو ور نگوید هیچ از آنای وای تو
english_translation: If he speak from that  thy foot will stumble and if he speak naught of that oh alas for thee

persian_text: چون سلاح و جهل جمع آید به هم گشت فرعونی جهانسوز از ستم
english_translation: When weapons and ignorance are brought together he becomes in his tyranny a worldconsuming Pharaoh

persian_text: از خطر پرهیز آمد مفترض بشنوید از من حدیث بیغرض
english_translation: Tis a bounden duty to abstain from peril hear disinterested advice from me

persian_text: چونک بلقیس از دل و جان عزم کرد بر زمان رفته هم افسوس خورد
english_translation: When Bilqís set out with heart and soul she felt remorse too for the bygone time

persian_text: تا زنید آن کیمیاهای نظر بر سر مسهای اشخاص بشر
english_translation: That ye may cast the elixir of your looks upon the copper of human individuals

persian_text: کی درین عالم بت و بتگر بدی چون کسی را زهرهی تسخر بدی
english_translation: How would there be idol and idolater in this world How would any one have the stomach to mock

persian_text: ساحری صحن برنجی را به فن صحن پر کرمی کند در انجمن
english_translation: A magician by his art makes a dish of rice a dish full of worms in the assembly

persian_text: که روید آنجا رسولی آمدست هر چه میخواهید زو آید به دست
english_translation: Saying Begone A prophet is come there  from him will be obtained whatsoever ye crave

persian_text: زن چنان کرد و چو دید آن طفل او جنس خود خوش خوش بدو ورد آورد
english_translation: The woman did so and when her child saw its congener it turned its face towards it with delight

persian_text: صد عزیمت میکنی بهر سفر میکشاند مر ترا جای دگر
english_translation: Thou makest a hundred resolutions to journey  He draweth thee to some other place

persian_text: برق آفل باشد و بس بیوفا آفل از باقی ندانی بیصفا
english_translation: Lightning is transient and very faithless without clearness you will not know the transient from the permanent

persian_text: تا بدانی در عدم خورشیدهاست وآنچ اینجا آفتاب آنجا سهاست
english_translation: That you may know that in nonexistence there are suns and that what is a sun here is a small star yonder

persian_text: لیک با خانهی شهنشاه زمن اینچنین گستاخیی ناید ز من
english_translation: But such a disrespect to the house of the emperor of the world cannot be shown by me

persian_text: الصلاای جمله اسرائیلیان شاه میخواند شما را زان مکان
english_translation: Welcome O all ye Israelites The King calls you from that place

persian_text: چون جدا بینی ز حق این خواجه را گم کنی هم متن و هم دیباجه را
english_translation: When you regard this Khwája as separate from God you lose both the text and the preface

persian_text: قصهی تیر اندازی و ترسیدن او از سواری که در بیشه میرفت
english_translation: The story of an archer and his fear of a horseman who was riding in a forest

persian_text: تا نباشد از سبب در کشمکش تا بود هر استعانت از منش
english_translation: And not be distracted by any secondary cause to the end that every call for help should be made by him to Me

persian_text: کوهها هم لحن داودی کند جوهر آهن بکف مومی بود
english_translation: The mountains too make a song like that of David and the substance of iron is wax in the hand

persian_text: ای خدا این سنگ دل را موم کن نالهی ما را خوش و مرحوم کن
english_translation: O God make this stony heart wax make our wailing sweet and an object of mercy

persian_text: چونک با کودک سر و کارم فتاد همزبان کودکان باید گشاد
english_translation: Since my business happens to be with a child I must accordingly speak the language suited to children

persian_text: هر که او این ماه زاییدست هین گنجها گیرید از شاه مکین
english_translation: Take heed Every one of you that has borne a child during this month shall receive treasures from the mighty King

persian_text: کوهها ببرید و وادی دراز بهر دید شیخ با صدق و نیاز
english_translation: He traversed the mountains and the long valley to visit the Shaykh who was endowed with sincerity and fervent supplication

persian_text: نیکبختی را چو حق رنجی دهد رخت را نزدیکتر وا مینهد
english_translation: when God brings some trouble on a goodfortuned man he always abides nearer

persian_text: من کجا باور کنم آن دزد را دزد کی داند ثواب و مزد را
english_translation: How shall I believe that thief How should a thief know the recompense and reward for good works

persian_text: مرغ بیهنگام شد آن چشم او از نتیجهی کبر او و خشم او
english_translation: That eye of his from the result of his pride and his anger became the cock that crows unseasonably

persian_text: پس اگر ابلیس هم ساجد شدی او نبودی آدم او غیری بدی
english_translation: If then Iblís too had become a worshipper  he would not have been Adam he would have been another

persian_text: عین آن مکر آیت موسی شود اعتبار آن عصا بالا رود
english_translation: Those very plots only serve to manifest the veracity of Moses the prestige of his rod goes up

persian_text: ای سگگرگین زشت از حرص و جوش پوستین شیر را بر خود مپوش
english_translation: O foul mangy dog through greed and exuberant insolence do not clothe thyself in the lions skin

persian_text: آنچنان مستی مباش ای بیخرد که به عقل آید پشیمانی خورد
english_translation: O man without wisdom do not be an inebriate of the sort that he comes to his wits he feels sorry

persian_text: او همیشد بیسر و بی پای مست پای مینشناخت در رفتن ز دست
english_translation: He was going along without head or foot intoxicated  in going he knew not foot from hand

persian_text: قیمتی گوهر نتیجهی مهر و ود بر چنان خاطر چرا پوشیده شد
english_translation: The precious pearl the product of love and affectionwhy was it veiled from hearts like those

persian_text: گفت پیغمبر که یزدان مجید از پی هر درد درمان آفرید
english_translation: The Prophet said that the glorious God has created a remedy for every pain

persian_text: کی بروید سبزهی ذوق وصال کی بجوشد چشمهها ز آب زلال
english_translation: How shall the herbage grow of the delight of union  How shall the fountains of clear water gush forth

persian_text: تا خوری دانه نیفتی تو به دام این کند علم و قناعت والسلام
english_translation: So that you may eat the grain and not fall into the trap Knowledge and contentment effect this And farewell

persian_text: از پدر آموز که آدم در گناه خوش فرود آمد به سوی پایگاه
english_translation: Learn from thy Father for in sin Adam came down willingly to the vestibule

persian_text: خود نمییابم یکی گوشی که من نکتهای گویم از آن چشم حسن
english_translation: Verily I do not find a single ear to which I should tell a mystery concerning that beauteous eye

persian_text: چون به امر اهبطوا بندی شدند حبس خشم و حرص و خرسندی شدند
english_translation: When they were constrained by the command Get ye down they became engaoled in anger and covetousness and contentment

persian_text: نه ترا شبها مناجات و قیام نه ترا در روز پرهیز و صیام
english_translation: No nightly orisons and vigils no abstinence and fasting in the daytime

persian_text: بهر تو ار پست کردم گفت و گو تا بسازی با رفیق زشتخو
english_translation: If I have made my discourse low for your sake in order that you may put up with an illnatured companion

persian_text: پس در آتش افکنی این دانه را پیشگیری پیشهی مردانه را
english_translation: This grain then thou wilt cast into the fire and adopt the profession that is worthy of a man

persian_text: این تکبر چیست غفلت از لباب منجمد چون غفلت یخ ز آفتاب
english_translation: What is this arrogance being oblivious to the essential principle and frozen like the oblivion of ice to the sun

persian_text: زانک ترک کار چون نازی بود ناز کی در خورد جانبازی بود
english_translation: For to renounce exertion is like an act of disdain how should disdain be seemly for a devoted lover

persian_text: بر قرین خویش مفزا در صفت کان فراق آرد یقین در عاقبت
english_translation: Do not exceed in quality him that is thy yokefellow for that will assuredly bring about separation in the end

persian_text: او سواره گشت در موکب به گاه ناگهان دید اسپ را خوارزمشاه
english_translation: Early he rode out in the royal cavalcade suddenly the Khwárizmsháh observed the horse

persian_text: کلما هم اوقدوا نار الوغی اطفاء الله نارهم حتی انطفا
english_translation: As often as they kindle the fire of warfare God quenches their fire so that it is put out

persian_text: در میان مار و کژدمگر ترا با خیالات خوشان دارد خدا
english_translation: If amidst snakes and scorpions God keep you with the fancies of them that are fair

persian_text: رنجور شدن اوستاد به وهم
english_translation: How the teacher was made ill by imagination

persian_text: خدمت اکسیر کن مسوار تو جور میکش ای دل از دل دار تو
english_translation: Do service to the elixir like copper endure oppression O heart from him that holds the heart in fee

persian_text: باز گفتند ار کساد و ار روا چیست بر ما بنده فرمانیم ما
english_translation: again they said Whether it be worthless or valuable what matter to us We are slaves to the command

persian_text: از سخن میگویم این ورنه خدا از سیهرویان کند فردا ترا
english_translation: I say this of words otherwise  tomorrow God will make thee one of the blackfaced

persian_text: که گروهی را زبون کرد او بسحر من نیایم جانب او نیم شبر
english_translation: Who subdued a multitude by magic I will not come half a span towards him

persian_text: بیغرض نبود به گردش در جهان غیر جسم و غیر جان عاشقان
english_translation: Nothing in the world is without object in its movement except the bodies and the souls of lovers

persian_text: شد سوی تبریز و کوی گلستان خفته اومیدش فراز گل ستان
english_translation: He went to Tabríz and the rosegarden district his hope was reclining on roses

persian_text: خیر باشد رنگ تو بر جای نیست این اثر یا از هوا یا از تبیست
english_translation: May it be well  Your colour is changed this is the effect either of air or of a fever

persian_text: گفته هر برگ و شکوفه آن غصون دم بدم یا لیت قوم یعلمون
english_translation: every leaf and bud of those boughs said continually Oh would that my people knew

persian_text: ای ضیاء الحق تو دیدی حال او حق نمودت پاسخ افعال او
english_translation: O Ziyáu lHaqq  thou hast seen his state God hath shown unto thee the answer to his actions

persian_text: تن بمردت سوی اسرافیل ران دل فسردت رو به خورشید روان
english_translation: If your body is dead resort to Isráfíl if your heart is frozen repair to the sun of the Spirit

persian_text: خندمینتر از تو هیچ افسانه نیست بر لب گور خراب خویش ایست
english_translation: No story is more laughable than thou  stand on the edge of thine own ruinous grave

persian_text: رجوع به حکایت زید
english_translation: The return to the story of Zayd

persian_text: کای رهاننده مرا از وصف زشتای کننده دوزخی را تو بهشت
english_translation: Singing O Thou that deliverest me from evil qualities O Thou that makest a hell Paradise

persian_text: آن دمی کز وی مسیحا دم نزد حق ز غیرت نیز بیما هم نزد
english_translation: That word of which the Messiah breathed not a word God from jealousy did not utter even without má

persian_text: گر شکال آرد کسی بر گفت ما از برای انبیا و اولیا
english_translation: If any one should raise a difficulty about my words in regard to the prophets and saints

persian_text: دانهی بیمغز کی گردد نهال صورت بیجان نباشد جز خیال
english_translation: How shall a berry without kernel become a sapling The soulless form is naught but phantasy

persian_text: پرسیدن معشوقی از عاشق غریب خود
english_translation: How a loved one asked her lover

persian_text: بردشان بر گور او بنمود راه پس سهروزه داشتند از بهر شاه
english_translation: She took them and showed the way to his grave then they kept a three days fast for the sake of the King

persian_text: گوهر جان چون ورای فصلهاست خوی او این نیست خوی کبریاست
english_translation: since the substance the spirit is beyond ramifications its nature is not this  it is the nature of Majesty

persian_text: کین چنین فعلی ترا نافع بود و آنچنان فعلی ز ره قاطع بود
english_translation: that a deed like this will be beneficial to thee while a deed like that will cut off from the Way

persian_text: ای خجسته رنج و بیماری و تبای مبارک درد و بیداری شب
english_translation: O happy pain and sickness and fever O blessed anguish and wakefulness in the night

persian_text: چشم خر چون اولش بی آخرستگر دو چشمش هست حکمش اعورست
english_translation: Since the donkeys eye the beginning is not accompanied by the end it is in the same case as the oneeyed man if it has two eyes

persian_text: گر دوا را این مرض قابل بدی آخر از وی ذرهای زایل شدی
english_translation: If this disease were susceptible of cure some particle of it would at last have been removed

persian_text: آن یکی سرسبز نحن المتقون وآن دگر همچون بنفشه سرنگون
english_translation: One fresh and green saying We are the devout and the other drooping their heads like the violet

persian_text: بیتماشای صفتهای خداگر خورم نان در گلو ماند مرا
english_translation: If I eat bread without the view of Gods attributes it will stick in my throat

persian_text: او خروس آسمان بوده ز پیش نعرههای او همه در وقت خویش
english_translation: He has been the cock of Heaven from of old all his crowings are at their time

persian_text: روز باران است میرو تا به شب نی از این باران از آن باران رب
english_translation: Tis a day of rain journey on till nightnot by this rain but by the rain of the Lord

persian_text: به راه کردن شاه یکی را از آن دو غلام و از این دیگر پرسیدن
english_translation: How the King sent away one of the two slaves and interrogated the other

persian_text: آن جهانگر دیده است آن پر نیاز رونقی یابد ز نوحه آن نماز
english_translation: If the supplicant has seen yonder world that prayer gains a lustre from lamentation

persian_text: پس ز عرش اندر بهشتستان رود در جهان هم چیزکی ظاهر شود
english_translation: Then from the Throne they flow into Paradise some little thing appears in this world too

persian_text: رنج گنج آمد که رحمتها در اوست مغز تازه شد چو بخراشید پوست
english_translation: Pain is a treasure for there are mercies in it the kernel becomes fresh when you scrape off the rind

persian_text: آن جماعت را که وافی بودهاند بر همه اصنافشان افزودهاند
english_translation: The company who have been loyal are given superiority over all sorts

persian_text: بلک باید دل سوی بیسوی بست نحس اینسو عکس نحس بیسو است
english_translation: Nay you must fix your heart on that which is quarterless  the illluck in this quarter is the reflexion of the illluck in the realm where no quarters exist

persian_text: جوشش خون باشد آن وا جستها خارش دلها و بحث و ماجرا
english_translation: Those inquiries the pricking of beans and the investigation and discussion are the stirring of the blood

persian_text: خود بدانی چون بر آری سر ز خواب ختم شد و الله أعلم بالصواب
english_translation: You will surely know when you lift your head from sleep Tis the end  and God knows best what is right

persian_text: چونک گم شد جمله جمله یافتند از کم آمد سوی کل بشتافتند
english_translation: Since all has been lost they have gained all through dwindling away they have sped towards the Whole

persian_text: آن سیه حیران شد از برهان او میدمید از لامکان ایمان او
english_translation: The negro was astounded at his evidentiary miracle his faith was dawning from nonspatiality

persian_text: گفت معشوقی به عاشق کای فتی تو به غربت دیدهای بس شهرها
english_translation: A loved one said to her lover O youth thou hast seen many cities abroad

persian_text: این دهان خود خاکخواری آمدست لیک خاکی را که آن رنگین شدست
english_translation: This mouth indeed has been an eater of earth but an earth that has been coloured

persian_text: مینیندیشیم آخر ما به هوش کین خلل در گندم است از مکر موش
english_translation: after all do not we consider with intelligent mind that this damage to the corn arises from the deceitfulness of the mouse
